整點：It's three o'clock.（三點整）= It's 3:00.
半點：It's three thirty.（三點半）= It's 3:30.
日常口語直接說數字：It's 3:15.
⚠️ AM = 上午 / PM = 下午

日期的說法：
月+序數日：May 5th（五月五日）
年份：2026 = twenty twenty-six
問日期：What's the date today?（今天幾號？）
→ It's March 25th.（三月二十五日）
⚠️ 美式：月/日/年 → March 25, 2026

時間片語：
in the morning（在早上）/ in the afternoon（在下午）/ in the evening（在晚上）
at noon（中午）/ at midnight（午夜）/ at night（晚上）
every day（每天）/ every week（每週）/ every month（每月）
on weekdays（平日）/ on weekends（週末）
⚠️ at night ✅（不是 in night ❌）

三餐名稱：
breakfast（早餐）/ lunch（午餐）/ dinner（晚餐）
動詞搭配：have / eat breakfast
例：I have breakfast（吃早餐）at 7:00.
⚠️ 三餐前不加 the/a：have lunch ✅ have the lunch ❌

主食：rice（飯）/ bread（麵包）/ noodles（麵）
肉類：chicken（雞肉）/ beef（牛肉）/ pork（豬肉）/ fish（魚）
蔬果：apple（蘋果）/ banana（香蕉）/ orange（柳橙）
tomato（番茄）/ potato（馬鈴薯）
⚠️ noodles 永遠複數！tomato→tomatoes

飲料：water（水）/ milk（牛奶）/ juice（果汁）
tea（茶）/ coffee（咖啡）
點心：cake（蛋糕）/ cookie（餅乾）/ ice cream（冰淇淋）
chocolate（巧克力）/ candy（糖果）
⚠️ 飲料大多不可數：a glass of water（一杯水）/ two cups of tea（兩杯茶）

形容食物味道：
delicious / yummy（好吃）/ sweet（甜）/ sour（酸）
salty（鹹）/ spicy（辣）/ bitter（苦）/ fresh（新鮮）
terrible（難吃/糟糕）
例：The soup（湯）is too salty（太鹹了）.

教室常見物品：
desk（書桌）/ chair（椅子）/ board（黑白板）
window（窗戶）/ door（門）/ clock（時鐘）
fan（電扇）/ light（燈）/ computer（電腦）
例：There is a clock（時鐘）on the wall（牆上）.

家中常見物品：
bed（床）/ sofa（沙發）/ table（桌子）
TV（電視）/ refrigerator / fridge（冰箱）
lamp（檯燈）/ mirror（鏡子）/ towel（毛巾）
⚠️ table（餐桌/茶几）= 吃飯用 / desk（書桌）= 讀書辦公用

住家空間：
living room（客廳）/ bedroom（臥室）/ kitchen（廚房）
bathroom（浴室）/ dining room（餐廳）/ balcony（陽台）
garage（車庫）/ garden（花園）
例：My room（房間）is next to the bathroom（浴室）.

短文：My bedroom（臥室）is not big, but comfortable（舒適）.
There is a bed（床）, a desk（書桌）, and a bookshelf（書架）.
On the desk, there are some books（書）and a lamp（檯燈）.
I usually do my homework（做功課）at the desk.
I like my room!

現在進行式 = 正在做的事
公式：S + am/is/are + V-ing
例：I am eating lunch now.
　　She is reading a book.
⚠️ 現在簡單式 = 習慣 / 現在進行式 = 此刻正在

動詞加ing五大規則：
① 大多數：直接+ing → play→playing
② 字尾e：去e+ing → make→making
③ 短母音+單子音：重複子音+ing → run→running
④ ie結尾：去ie+ying → die→dying
⑤ 字尾c：+king → picnic→picnicking

容易拼錯的V-ing：
swim→swimming（重複m）/ sit→sitting
write→writing（去e）/ come→coming（去e）
lie→lying / die→dying（ie→y）
⚠️ open→opening（不重複！重音不在最後音節）

進行式肯定句：
I am watching TV.
He is playing basketball.
They are studying in the library.
⚠️ 主詞決定be動詞：I→am / 三單→is / 複數→are

進行式否定 → be動詞後加not：
I am not sleeping.（I'm not...）
She is not / isn't talking.
We are not / aren't listening.
⚠️ 跟be動詞否定句規則完全一樣！

進行式問句 → be動詞搬到句首：
Are you doing your homework?
→ Yes, I am. / No, I'm not.
Is he sleeping? → Yes, he is.
⚠️ 回答不能說 Yes, I'm. → Yes, I am. ✅

Wh- + be + S + V-ing?
What are you doing? → I'm reading.
Where is she going? → She's going to school.
Who is singing? → Amy is.
⚠️ Who當主詞：Who is singing?（不需要倒裝）

進行式常搭配的時間詞：
now（現在）/ right now（就是現在）
at the moment（此刻）/ Look!（看！）
Listen!（聽！）/ Be quiet!（安靜！）
⚠️ 看到Look!/Listen!後面通常接進行式

有些動詞「不能」用進行式（狀態動詞）：
like / love / hate / want / need
know / understand / believe / remember
have（擁有時）/ see / hear
❌ I am liking it. → ✅ I like it.
⚠️ 狀態動詞只用簡單式！

現在簡單式 vs 現在進行式：
簡單式：I eat breakfast every day.（習慣）
進行式：I am eating breakfast now.（正在）

簡單式 = 每天/總是/通常
進行式 = 現在/此刻/看！聽！
items.pushTitle: 簡單式 vs 進行式

items.content:
進行式也能表示「已安排好的近期計畫」：
I am leaving tomorrow.（我明天要走了）
We are having a party tonight.（今晚要辦派對）
⚠️ 這種用法通常有明確的未來時間詞

電話中常用進行式：
Hello, this is Kevin speaking.（我是Kevin）
Is Amy there? → She is taking a shower.
Can I leave a message? → Sure.
⚠️ 電話自我介紹：This is...（不說 I am...）

看圖描述 = 進行式最佳應用：
In the picture, a boy is riding a bike.
Two girls are talking under a tree.
A dog is running in the park.
⚠️ 會考看圖題幾乎都用進行式描述！

改成進行式：
① I (read) a novel now. → am reading
② She (swim) in the pool. → is swimming
③ They (not/watch) TV. → aren't watching
④ (you/do) your homework? → Are you doing
⑤ What (he/eat)? → is he eating

can = 能夠/會（表示能力）
I can swim. / She can play the piano.
否定：I cannot / can't swim.
問句：Can you speak English?
⚠️ can後面接原形動詞！She can plays ❌ → can play ✅

can也能表示許可和請求：
許可：You can go now.（你可以走了）
請求：Can I use your pen?（我可以借筆嗎？）
⚠️ Can I...? = 我可以...嗎？（對朋友/家人）
Could I...? = 更禮貌（對長輩/陌生人）

may = 可以（比can更正式的許可）
May I come in?（我可以進來嗎？）
May I ask a question?
回答：Yes, you may. / No, you may not.
⚠️ May I...? 比 Can I...? 更禮貌正式

may 也表示「可能」：
It may rain tomorrow.（明天可能下雨）
She may be late.（她可能遲到）
may not = 可能不
⚠️ may表推測時不確定性較高（大約50%）

must = 必須/一定要
You must finish your homework.（你必須完成作業）
We must follow the rules.
否定：must not / mustn't = 禁止（不是「不必」！）
⚠️ You mustn't cheat. = 你不准作弊！

must vs have to 都是「必須」：
must → 說話者認為必須（主觀）
have to → 外在規定必須（客觀）
例：I must study hard.（我覺得我應該）
I have to wear a uniform.（學校規定）
⚠️ have to 有三單：He has to...

should = 應該（建議/忠告）
You should eat more vegetables.
You should not / shouldn't stay up late.
⚠️ should 語氣比 must 輕：
must = 一定要（命令）/ should = 最好（建議）

would like = want 的禮貌說法
I would like (= I'd like) some water.
Would you like some tea?
→ Yes, please. / No, thanks.
⚠️ would like + to V：I'd like to go home.

所有助動詞的共同規則：
① 後面一定接「原形動詞」
② 否定直接加not
③ 問句直接搬到句首
④ 沒有三單變化（不加s）
⚠️ She can plays ❌ / He musts ❌ → 助動詞永不加s！

同一個助動詞，不同意思：
can：① 能力（I can swim.）② 許可（Can I go?）
may：① 許可（May I leave?）② 可能（It may rain.）
must：① 必須（You must go.）② 推測（He must be tired.）
⚠️ 看語境判斷意思！

助動詞否定的意思差異：
don't have to = 不必（不需要做）
mustn't = 禁止（不准做）→ 差很大！
例：You don't have to come.（你不用來）
You mustn't smoke here.（這裡禁止吸煙）

選正確助動詞：
① __ I borrow your book?（May / Can）
② You __ wear a helmet.（must）
③ She __ speak three languages.（can）
④ You __ eat more fruit.（should）
⑤ He __ be at home. I'm not sure.（may）

be動詞過去式：
am/is → was / are → were
I was happy yesterday.
You were late this morning.
She was a student two years ago.
⚠️ I 和三單用 was，You和複數用 were

過去式be動詞肯定句：
I was tired last night.
He was at home yesterday.
They were in the park.
We were classmates in elementary school.
⚠️ 常搭配過去時間詞

過去式be否定 → 加not：
I was not (wasn't) at school.
They were not (weren't) happy.
例：The test wasn't easy.
We weren't ready.

過去式be問句 → 搬到句首：
Was she at the party? → Yes, she was.
Were you tired? → No, I wasn't.
Where were you yesterday?
⚠️ 回答：Yes, I was. ✅ Yes, I was't. ❌

過去式常搭配的時間詞：
yesterday / last night / last week / last year
two days ago / three years ago
in 2020 / when I was young
this morning（如果早上已過）
⚠️ ago放在時間後面：two days ago ✅

There is/are 的過去式：
There was a dog in the park.（那時有一隻狗）
There were many people at the concert.
否定：There wasn't any milk.
問句：Was there a test yesterday?

現在 vs 過去對照：
I am happy now. → I was happy yesterday.
She is a teacher. → She was a student before.
They are here. → They were there.
⚠️ 換時間詞就要換be動詞時態！

出生用was/were born：
I was born in 2012.
She was born in Taipei.
Where were you born? → I was born in Tainan.
⚠️ born永遠搭配was/were（被動語態）
不能說 I born in... ❌

過去式be + 形容詞 = 描述過去狀態：
I was nervous before the test.（考前好緊張）
The movie was boring.（那部電影很無聊）
The students were excited.（學生們很興奮）
⚠️ 同一個形容詞，搭配was/were看主詞

填was或were：
① I __ at home last night.（was）
② They __ very tired yesterday.（were）
③ __ she at the party?（Was）
④ There __ no clouds in the sky.（were）
⑤ Where __ you born?（were）

過去簡單式 = 過去發生且已結束的事
公式：S + V-ed（過去式動詞）
例：I played basketball yesterday.
　　She visited her grandma last week.
⚠️ 不管主詞是誰，動詞變化都一樣！不用管三單

動詞過去式規則變化：
① 大多數：+ed → played, walked
② 字尾e：+d → liked, danced
③ 子音+y：去y+ied → studied, carried
④ 短母音+單子音：重複+ed → stopped, planned
⚠️ 母音+y直接加ed：played, enjoyed

高頻不規則動詞（第一組）：
go→went / come→came / eat→ate
do→did / have→had / make→made
see→saw / get→got / give→gave
take→took / say→said / tell→told

高頻不規則動詞（第二組）：
read→read（拼法不變，發音變/rɛd/）
write→wrote / run→ran / swim→swam
think→thought / buy→bought
teach→taught / catch→caught
bring→brought / feel→felt

高頻不規則動詞（第三組）：
know→knew / grow→grew / throw→threw
wear→wore / speak→spoke / break→broke
choose→chose / wake→woke
begin→began / sing→sang / drink→drank
⚠️ 口訣：know/grow/throw 一起背（ew結尾）

過去式否定：S + did not / didn't + 原形V
I didn't go to school yesterday.
She didn't eat breakfast this morning.
⚠️ didn't後面一定用「原形」！
She didn't went ❌ → She didn't go ✅

過去式問句：Did + S + 原形V?
Did you watch the movie?
→ Yes, I did. / No, I didn't.
Did she call you? → No, she didn't.
⚠️ Did問句動詞用原形！Did he went ❌

Wh- + did + S + 原形V?
What did you do yesterday?
Where did she go last weekend?
When did they arrive?
How did he get there?
⚠️ Who當主詞不用did：Who broke the window?

過去式-ed的三種發音：
① /t/：字尾無聲子音 → walked, watched, stopped
② /d/：字尾有聲子音/母音 → played, called, lived
③ /ɪd/：字尾t/d → wanted, needed, started
⚠️ 發音影響聽力題！多聽多唸

現在簡單 vs 過去簡單：
I eat breakfast every day.（現在的習慣）
I ate breakfast this morning.（今早的動作）
⚠️ 關鍵線索看時間詞：
every day → 現在 / yesterday → 過去
items.pushTitle: 現在式 vs 過去式

items.content:
過去式三大時間詞搭配：
① ago：two hours ago / a week ago
② last：last night / last Monday / last year
③ in + 過去年份：in 2020
⚠️ ago放後面 / last放前面
three days ago ✅ / ago three days ❌

寫英文日記 = 過去式最佳練習：
Today I got up at 7:00.
I had breakfast and went to school.
After school, I played basketball with my friends.
We had a great time!
⚠️ 日記全篇用過去式（因為記錄今天做過的事）

過去式五大地雷：
❌ I didn't went → ✅ I didn't go
❌ Did she liked? → ✅ Did she like?
❌ He goed there → ✅ He went there
❌ I readed a book → ✅ I read a book（唸/rɛd/）
❌ Yesterday I eat → ✅ Yesterday I ate

三態轉換練習：
肯定：He played tennis yesterday.
否定：He didn't play tennis yesterday.
問句：Did he play tennis yesterday?
回答：Yes, he did. / No, he didn't.
⚠️ 否定和問句都還原成原形！

不規則動詞快速記憶分組：
AAA型（不變）：cut-cut / put-put / read-read
ABB型：buy-bought / think-thought / teach-taught
ABC型：go-went-gone / eat-ate-eaten
⚠️ 現在只需記前兩態（原形+過去式）

改錯+填空：
① She (go) to the movies yesterday. → went
② Did they (enjoy) the party? → enjoy
③ We (not/see) him last week. → didn't see
④ What (you/do) last night? → did you do
⑤ Who (break) the window? → broke

祈使句 = 動詞開頭，省略You
命令：Stand up. / Open the door.
請求：Please sit down. / Please be quiet.
⚠️ please 放句首或句尾都可以：
Please wait. = Wait, please.

否定祈使句 = Don't + 原形V
Don't run in the hallway.（不要在走廊跑）
Don't be late.（不要遲到）
Don't worry.（別擔心）
⚠️ Don't 後面不管什麼動詞都用原形

Let's = Let us = 我們一起…吧
Let's go! / Let's eat lunch.
Let's not argue.（我們別吵了）
回答：OK! / Sure! / Good idea! / Sorry, I can't.
⚠️ Let me... = 讓我…（個人）Let's = 一起（大家）

祈使句語氣由強到弱：
① 命令：Stop!（停！）
② 指示：Turn left at the corner.（左轉）
③ 建議：Try this cake.（試試這蛋糕）
④ 禮貌：Please have a seat.（請坐）
⚠️ 加please/加語氣詞可降低命令感

What引導的感嘆句：
What + a/an + 形容詞 + 名詞!
What a beautiful day!（多美的一天！）
What an interesting book!（多有趣的書！）
複數/不可數不加a/an：What good news!

How引導的感嘆句：
How + 形容詞/副詞!
How beautiful!（多美！）
How fast he runs!（他跑得多快！）
How time flies!（時間過得多快！）
⚠️ What + 名詞 / How + 形容詞

What vs How 感嘆句比較：
What a smart boy (he is)!（強調名詞boy）
How smart (he is)!（強調形容詞smart）
兩種都對，語氣一樣強
⚠️ 口語中常省略後面的主詞+動詞

改寫：
① 祈使句：You should be quiet. → Be quiet.
② 否定祈使：You shouldn't run here. → Don't run here.
③ What感嘆：It is a cute cat. → What a cute cat!
④ How感嘆：She is so kind. → How kind she is!
⑤ Let's：We should go now. → Let's go now.

對等連接詞三巨頭：
and = 和/而且：I like dogs and cats.
but = 但是：He is short but strong.
or = 或者：Tea or coffee?
⚠️ 連接兩個對等的東西（字+字、句+句）

因果連接詞：
because = 因為（原因）
so = 所以（結果）
例：I was tired, so I went to bed early.
　　I went to bed early because I was tired.
⚠️ because和so不能同時用在同一句！

時間連接詞①：
before = 在…之前：Wash your hands before you eat.
after = 在…之後：I watched TV after I finished homework.
⚠️ before/after可放句首或句中

時間連接詞②：
when = 當…的時候：When I got home, it was dark.
while = 在…的同時：While I was sleeping, the phone rang.
⚠️ when + 短動作/while + 長動作（進行中的事）

條件連接詞：
if = 如果：If it rains, we stay home.
　If you are hungry, eat something.
⚠️ if子句用「現在式」，主句也用「現在式或祈使句」：
If you feel tired, take a rest. ✅
If it rains, I don't go out. ✅
（搭配未來式 will 的用法 → 八上教）

that引導名詞子句（初步認識）：
I think (that) she is right.
I know (that) he likes music.
I hope (that) you can come.
⚠️ 口語中that常省略：I think she is right.

連接詞位置規則：
① 放兩句中間：I like tea, but she likes coffee.
② 放句首（加逗號）：Because I was sick, I stayed home.
③ 放句首（加逗號）：If you need help, call me.
⚠️ 句首有連接詞 → 中間加逗號

填連接詞：
① I like pizza __ I don't like hamburgers.（but）
② Study hard, __ you won't pass the test.（or）
③ She was happy __ she got a gift.（because）
④ Brush your teeth __ you go to bed.（before）
⑤ __ it is sunny, let's go to the park.（If）

日常動作：
walk（走）/ run（跑）/ jump（跳）/ sit（坐）/ stand（站）
sleep（睡）/ wake up（醒來）/ get up（起床）
⚠️ wake up（醒）= 意識清醒 / get up（起床）= 離開床

手部動作：
write（寫）/ draw（畫）/ hold（握）/ carry（搬）
push（推）/ pull（拉）/ throw（丟）/ catch（接）
open（打開）/ close（關）/ cut（切）/ touch（觸摸）

移動動作：
go（去）/ come（來）/ leave（離開）/ arrive（到達）
enter（進入）/ climb（爬）/ fly（飛）
ride（騎）/ drive（開車）/ cross（穿越）
例：He rides（騎）his bike to school.

球類：basketball（籃球）/ baseball（棒球）/ soccer（足球）
tennis（網球）/ volleyball（排球）/ badminton（羽球）/ table tennis（桌球）
個人：swimming（游泳）/ running（跑步）/ jogging（慢跑）
cycling（騎車）/ skating（溜冰）/ yoga（瑜伽）
⚠️ play+球類 / go+V-ing

運動搭配動詞：
play+球類：play basketball（打籃球）/ play tennis（打網球）
go+V-ing：go swimming（去游泳）/ go hiking（去健行）/ go camping（去露營）
do+運動名稱：do yoga（做瑜伽）/ do exercise（做運動）
⚠️ play swimming ❌ → go swimming ✅

休閒活動：
read（閱讀）/ sing（唱歌）/ dance（跳舞）/ cook（煮飯）
paint（畫畫）/ take photos（拍照）/ play video games（打電動）
listen to music（聽音樂）/ watch movies（看電影）
⚠️ listen 後面一定加 to

家事動作：
clean（打掃）/ wash（洗）/ sweep（掃地）/ mop（拖地）
iron（燙衣服）/ cook（煮飯）
do the dishes（洗碗）/ take out the trash（倒垃圾）
例：I help my mom do the dishes（洗碗）.

短文：Last Sunday, I went to the park（公園）.
I played basketball（籃球）with my friends（朋友）.
After that, we went swimming（游泳）.
In the evening（晚上）, I watched a movie（電影）at home.
I was tired（累）but happy（開心）!

身材：tall（高）/ short（矮）/ heavy（重/胖）/ thin（瘦）
strong（強壯）/ weak（虛弱）
外表：beautiful（美麗）/ pretty（漂亮）/ handsome（帥）
cute（可愛）/ ugly（醜）
⚠️ beautiful 偏女性，handsome 偏男性

頭髮：long hair（長髮）/ short hair（短髮）
curly hair（捲髮）/ straight hair（直髮）
blond（金色）/ black（黑色）/ brown（棕色）
五官：big eyes（大眼睛）/ small nose（小鼻子）/ round face（圓臉）
例：She has long, straight, black hair.（她有一頭黑色直長髮）

正面性格：
kind（善良）/ friendly（友善）/ honest（誠實）/ brave（勇敢）
patient（有耐心）/ hard-working（勤勞）/ polite（有禮貌）
generous（大方）/ cheerful（開朗）/ confident（有自信）
例：My teacher is kind（善良）and patient（有耐心）.

負面性格：
lazy（懶惰）/ selfish（自私）/ mean（刻薄）/ rude（粗魯）
stubborn（固執）/ careless（粗心）/ impatient（沒耐心）
shy（害羞）→ 中性，不算負面
⚠️ shy 只是個性特質

情緒：
happy（開心）/ sad（難過）/ angry / mad（生氣）
excited（興奮）/ bored（無聊）/ scared / afraid（害怕）
surprised（驚訝）/ nervous（緊張）/ worried（擔心）
lonely（孤單）/ proud（驕傲/自豪）
⚠️ excited = 人感到興奮 / exciting = 事物令人興奮

程度副詞：
very（很）/ really（真的）/ a little（有一點）
quite（相當）/ so（好/這麼）
例：She is very smart（聰明）.
He is a little shy（有一點害羞）.
⚠️ 程度由弱到強：a little < quite < very < so

描述人的句型：
外表：She is tall（高）and has long hair（長髮）.
性格：He is friendly（友善）and funny（有趣）.
兩者結合：Amy is a pretty（漂亮）girl. She is kind（善良）and smart（聰明）.
⚠️ 用and連接同類，用but連接對比

短文：My best friend（最好的朋友）is Kevin.
He is tall（高）and a little heavy（有點胖）.
He has short hair（短髮）and big eyes（大眼睛）.
He is very funny（有趣）and always makes me laugh（笑）.
He is also hard-working（勤勞）and good at math（擅長數學）.
I'm glad（高興）he is my friend!

天氣形容詞：
sunny（晴天）/ cloudy（多雲）/ rainy（下雨）
windy（有風）/ snowy（下雪）/ foggy（有霧）
問天氣：How's the weather?（天氣如何？）
⚠️ It's sunny. 的 It 是虛主詞

溫度：
hot（熱）/ warm（溫暖）/ cool（涼爽）/ cold（冷）
freezing（極冷）/ boiling（極熱）→ 誇飾用法
例：It was very hot（很熱）yesterday.
⚠️ cool 也能形容人 = 酷/帥

四季：
spring（春）/ summer（夏）/ fall = autumn（秋）/ winter（冬）
搭配 in：in spring（在春天）
例：It is hot（熱）in summer and cold（冷）in winter.
⚠️ 美式用 fall，英式用 autumn

天氣+活動搭配：
sunny（晴天）→ go to the beach（去海邊）/ have a picnic（野餐）
rainy（下雨）→ stay home（待在家）/ read a book（看書）
snowy（下雪）→ make a snowman（堆雪人）/ go skiing（滑雪）
例：It's sunny today. Let's go hiking（健行）!

自然景觀：
sky（天空）/ cloud（雲）/ rain（雨）/ snow（雪）/ wind（風）
sun（太陽）/ moon（月亮）/ star（星星）
river（河）/ lake（湖）/ mountain（山）/ ocean（海洋）
island（島嶼）/ forest（森林）
例：There are many stars（星星）in the sky（天空）tonight.

短文：The weather（天氣）was great last weekend.
On Saturday, it was sunny（晴天）and warm（溫暖）.
I went to the beach（海邊）with my family（家人）.
On Sunday, it was cloudy（多雲）and a little cool（微涼）.
We stayed home（待在家）and watched movies（看電影）.

交通工具：
bus（公車）/ car（汽車）/ taxi（計程車）/ bike（腳踏車）
motorcycle（機車）/ MRT（捷運）/ train（火車）
airplane（飛機）/ ship（船）/ scooter（機車/滑板車）
⚠️ MRT = Mass Rapid Transit（捷運），國外多說 subway / metro（地鐵）

搭乘用法：
by+交通：by bus（搭公車）/ by car / by train
take+冠詞+交通：take the bus / take the MRT
ride a bike（騎腳踏車）/ drive a car（開車）
walk / on foot（走路）
⚠️ by 後面不加 the：by bus ✅ by the bus ❌

日常場所：
school（學校）/ hospital（醫院）/ bank（銀行）
post office（郵局）/ police station（警察局）
fire station（消防局）/ convenience store（便利商店）
supermarket（超市）/ department store（百貨公司）

休閒場所：
park（公園）/ zoo（動物園）/ museum（博物館）
theater（電影院/劇院）/ stadium（體育場）
restaurant（餐廳）/ café（咖啡廳）/ bookstore（書店）
night market（夜市）
例：Let's go to the night market（夜市）tonight!

問路：Excuse me（不好意思）, how can I get to the station（車站）?
Is there a bank（銀行）near here?
指路：Go straight.（直走）/ Turn left/right.（左/右轉）
It's on your left/right.（在你的左/右邊）
It's across from the park.（在公園對面）

方向指引進階：
Go along this street.（沿著這條街走）
Turn right at the traffic light.（在紅綠燈右轉）
Walk two blocks.（走兩個街區）
You can't miss it.（你不會錯過的）
⚠️ block（街區）= 美式常用

交通相關：
traffic light（紅綠燈）/ crosswalk / zebra crossing（斑馬線）
sidewalk（人行道）/ bridge（橋）
parking lot（停車場）/ speed limit（速限）
例：Cross the street（過馬路）at the crosswalk（斑馬線）.

短文：My home is far from（離...很遠）school.
I usually take the bus（搭公車）to school.
The bus stop（公車站）is next to a convenience store（便利商店）.
It takes about 30 minutes（大約30分鐘）.
Sometimes my dad drives（開車載）me to school.

will = 表示未來/預測/臨時決定
S + will + 原形V
I will call you later.（我等下打給你）
It will be sunny tomorrow.（明天會是晴天）
⚠️ will 後面一定接原形！She will goes ❌

否定：S + will not / won't + V
I won't be late.（我不會遲到）
問句：Will + S + V?
Will you come? → Yes, I will. / No, I won't.
⚠️ won't = will not（發音注意！）

be going to = 已計畫好的未來
S + am/is/are + going to + V
I'm going to study abroad.（我打算出國讀書）
She's going to visit her grandma.
⚠️ be going to 強調「已經計畫好」

will vs be going to 差異：
will → 臨時決定/預測：It will rain.（看起來要下雨）
going to → 事先計畫：I'm going to study tonight.（早就安排好）
⚠️ 考試時兩者常可通用，但語意有微妙差異

未來式常搭配的時間詞：
tomorrow / next week / next month / next year
in the future / this weekend / tonight
soon / later / in two days
例：We will have a test next Monday.

if 條件句搭配未來式（完整版）：
If + 現在式, S + will + V
If it rains, I will stay home.
If you study hard, you will pass the test.
⚠️ if子句不用will！If it will rain ❌
（七下學了基礎if，現在加上will主句）

Wh- + will + S + V?
What will you do this weekend?
→ I will go hiking.
Where will they go? → They'll go to Japan.
When will the movie start? → At 7 PM.

be going to 否定/問句：
否定：I'm not going to eat out tonight.
問句：Are you going to join the club?
→ Yes, I am. / No, I'm not.
Is she going to come? → Yes, she is.

除了will/be going to，還有其他未來表達：
① 現在進行式（已安排）：I'm leaving tomorrow.
② 現在簡單式（時刻表）：The train leaves at 6.
⚠️ 口語中三種都常用，考試最常考will和be going to

三大時態對比：
現在：I eat breakfast every day.（習慣）
過去：I ate breakfast this morning.（已發生）
未來：I will eat breakfast later.（還沒發生）
⚠️ 判斷關鍵 = 看時間詞！

shall vs will：
shall → 較正式，多用於I/We：Shall we go?
will → 通用，所有主詞都行
Shall I open the window?（我要不要開窗？）→ 請求
⚠️ 現代英文中shall很少用，考試偶爾出現

未來式常搭配的句型：
① too...to：It's too cold to go out.（太冷不能出門）
② enough to：She is old enough to drive.（夠大可以開車）
⚠️ too...to = 太...以至於不能 / enough to = 夠...所以可以

未來式常見錯誤：
❌ I will going to... → ✅ I will go... 或 I'm going to go...
❌ She wills come. → ✅ She will come.（will不加s）
❌ If it will rain → ✅ If it rains（if子句用現在式）
❌ I'm go to... → ✅ I'm going to...

填空：
① I __ (visit) my uncle next Sunday. → will visit / am going to visit
② If she __ (come), we __ (have) a party. → comes / will have
③ __ you __ (join) us tomorrow? → Will...join
④ They __ (not/go) to the movies tonight. → won't go / aren't going to go

比較級 = 兩者比較，用 -er 或 more
公式：A + be + 形容詞-er + than + B
Tom is taller than Jerry.
This book is more interesting than that one.
⚠️ 比較一定要有 than（比...）

比較級規則變化：
① 短字（1音節）：+er → tall→taller / old→older
② 字尾e：+r → nice→nicer / large→larger
③ 短母音+單子音：重複+er → big→bigger / hot→hotter
④ 子音+y：去y+ier → easy→easier / happy→happier

長形容詞（2音節以上）→ 用 more
more + 原形形容詞 + than
English is more difficult than math.
She is more beautiful than her sister.
⚠️ 不能同時用：more taller ❌ → taller ✅

不規則比較級（必背！）：
good/well → better
bad/badly → worse
many/much → more
little → less
far → farther/further
⚠️ gooder ❌ → better ✅ / badder ❌ → worse ✅

最高級 = 三者以上最...，用 -est 或 most
公式：A + be + the + 形容詞-est + in/of
She is the tallest in our class.
This is the most expensive bag in the store.
⚠️ 最高級前面一定要加 the！

最高級規則變化：
① 短字：+est → tallest / oldest
② 字尾e：+st → nicest / largest
③ 短母+單子：重複+est → biggest / hottest
④ 子音+y：去y+iest → easiest / happiest
長形容詞：the most + 原形

不規則最高級（必背）：
good/well → best
bad/badly → worst
many/much → most
little → least
far → farthest/furthest
例：She is the best student in the class.

最高級搭配 in 或 of：
in + 場所/範圍：the tallest in the class
of + 群體：the oldest of the three brothers
of all → 全部之中：She runs the fastest of all.
⚠️ in the world / in Taiwan / in our school
items.pushTitle: in 和 of 的搭配

items.content:
同等比較：as + 原形形容詞 + as
She is as tall as her mother.（跟...一樣高）
否定：not as/so...as
He is not as smart as his brother.（沒有...那麼聰明）
⚠️ as...as 中間用原形，不用比較級！

比較級的強調用法：
much / a lot / far / even + 比較級
She is much taller than me.（高很多）
This is even more expensive.（甚至更貴）
a little / a bit + 比較級
He is a little older than me.（大一點）

好用比較級句型：
① the + 比較級, the + 比較級：
The more you practice, the better you get.
② 比較級 + and + 比較級：
It's getting colder and colder.
⚠️ 越來越... = 比較級 and 比較級

比較級/最高級問句：
Which is bigger, A or B? → A is.
Which is the tallest, A, B, or C? → C is.
Who runs faster, Tom or Jerry?
Who is the best student in your class?

副詞也有比較級和最高級：
fast→faster→fastest / hard→harder→hardest
不規則：well→better→best / badly→worse→worst
長副詞：carefully→more carefully→most carefully
例：She speaks English more fluently than I do.

表達偏好：
like A better than B（比較喜歡A）
like A the best（最喜歡A）
I like summer better than winter.
I like English the best of all subjects.
⚠️ prefer A to B（更正式的說法）= like A better than B

比較級最高級五大地雷：
❌ more taller → ✅ taller
❌ the most tallest → ✅ the tallest
❌ She is tallest. → ✅ She is the tallest.
❌ He is gooder. → ✅ He is better.
❌ as taller as → ✅ as tall as（原形！）

填入正確形式：
① A is __ (big) than B. → bigger
② C is the __ (small) of the three. → smallest
③ This movie is __ (interesting) than that one. → more interesting
④ She sings __ (good) than her sister. → better
⑤ He is not __ (old) __ me. → as old as

不定詞 = to + 原形動詞
用法①當名詞：To read is fun. = It is fun to read.
用法②當目的：I went to the store to buy milk.
用法③接在動詞後：I want to eat pizza.
⚠️ to後面一定是原形！to eating ❌

接不定詞的常見動詞：
want to / hope to / plan to / decide to
need to / try to / learn to / agree to
例：I want to be a doctor.
She decided to study abroad.
⚠️ 這些動詞後面一定接 to V

動名詞 = V-ing 當名詞用
當主詞：Swimming is fun.
當受詞：I enjoy reading.
介系詞後：I'm good at singing.
⚠️ 動名詞長得跟進行式一樣，但功能不同！

接動名詞的常見動詞：
enjoy V-ing / finish V-ing / avoid V-ing
practice V-ing / mind V-ing / keep V-ing
例：I enjoy listening to music.
She finished writing her report.
⚠️ enjoy to listen ❌ → enjoy listening ✅

有些動詞接to V或V-ing意思相同：
like to read = like reading
love / hate / start / begin / continue
例：I started to rain. = It started raining.
⚠️ 意思不變的情況，考試兩者都對
items.pushTitle: to V 和 V-ing 都行

items.content:
接to V或V-ing意思不同的動詞（進階）：
stop to V = 停下來去做（目的）
stop V-ing = 停止做（結束動作）
He stopped to smoke. = 他停下來抽煙
He stopped smoking. = 他戒煙了
⚠️ remember/forget也有這種差異

It + be + adj + (for sb) + to V
It is important to study English.
It is easy for me to solve this problem.
It is nice of you to help me.
⚠️ for sb = 對某人而言 / of sb = 某人的本性

動詞 + 受詞 + to V：
ask sb to V：I asked him to help me.
tell sb to V：Mom told me to clean my room.
want sb to V：I want you to come.
⚠️ 中間一定要有「受詞（人）」

go + V-ing = 去做某活動
go shopping / go swimming / go hiking
go fishing / go camping / go jogging
例：Let's go shopping this afternoon.
⚠️ go後面接的是「活動」才用V-ing

花時間的兩種說法：
人 + spend + 時間 + V-ing
I spend two hours studying every day.
It + take + 人 + 時間 + to V
It takes me 30 minutes to walk to school.
⚠️ spend + V-ing / take + to V 不要混！

be used to + V-ing = 習慣做某事
I am used to getting up early.（我習慣早起）
used to + V = 過去曾經（現在沒有了）
I used to play basketball.（我以前常打籃球）
⚠️ be used to + V-ing ≠ used to + V
items.pushTitle: used to vs be used to

items.content:
不定詞放在名詞後面修飾 = 當形容詞
I have something to eat.（有東西吃）
There is nothing to worry about.
I need a pen to write with.
⚠️ something/anything/nothing + to V

不定詞/動名詞五大地雷：
❌ I enjoy to read → ✅ I enjoy reading
❌ I want eating → ✅ I want to eat
❌ She is good at to sing → ✅ good at singing
❌ It is fun swim → ✅ It is fun to swim
❌ I spend time to study → ✅ spend time studying

選to V或V-ing：
① She enjoys __ (dance). → dancing
② I want __ (go) home. → to go
③ It takes me an hour __ (get) there. → to get
④ He is used to __ (wake) up early. → waking
⑤ They decided __ (move) to Taipei. → to move

授與動詞 = 給某人某物，有兩個受詞
give / teach / show / send / buy / make / tell
兩種語序：
① give + IO(人) + DO(物)：Give me the book.
② give + DO + to + IO：Give the book to me.

授與動詞搭配 to 或 for：
to：give/send/show/teach/tell/lend + sth + to sb
for：buy/make/cook/get/find + sth + for sb
例：I bought a gift for her. = I bought her a gift.
⚠️ buy用for不用to！
items.pushTitle: to 和 for 的搭配

items.content:
連綴動詞 = be動詞的朋友，後接形容詞
look（看起來）/ sound（聽起來）/ smell（聞起來）
taste（嚐起來）/ feel（感覺起來）
例：The soup smells good.（湯聞起來好香）
⚠️ 不能加-ly：smells goodly ❌ → smells good ✅

表示「變成」的連綴動詞：
become + adj/N：She became famous.
get + adj：It's getting dark.（天變暗了）
turn + 顏色：The leaves turn red in fall.
⚠️ 三個都接形容詞，become也可接名詞

look + adj = 看起來怎樣
She looks happy.（她看起來開心）
look like + N = 看起來像
She looks like her mother.（她看起來像媽媽）
⚠️ like後面接名詞，不是形容詞

保持狀態的連綴動詞：
keep + adj：Keep quiet!（保持安靜）
stay + adj：Stay healthy!（保持健康）
remain + adj：He remained calm.（他保持冷靜）
⚠️ 都是「維持某狀態」→ 後接形容詞

seem / appear = 似乎/看來
She seems happy. = She seems to be happy.
It seems (that) he is tired.
He appears to be sleeping.
⚠️ seem + adj = seem + to be + adj

⚠️ 連綴動詞 vs 一般動詞（同一字兩種用法）：
look（看起來 vs 看）：She looks sad. / Look at me.
feel（感覺 vs 摸）：I feel cold. / Feel this cloth.
smell（聞起來 vs 聞）：It smells good. / Smell the flower.
判斷：後面接adj = 連綴 / 接N = 一般
items.pushTitle: 連綴 vs 一般動詞

items.content:
There seems to be... = 似乎有...
There seems to be a problem.（似乎有問題）
There appear to be many people.
⚠️ There seems = 單數 / There seem = 複數

選正確動詞形式：
① She __ (look) tired today.（looks）
② The cake __ (taste) delicious.（tastes）
③ He __ (give) me a book yesterday.（gave）
④ Mom __ (buy) a gift __ me.（bought...for）
⑤ The weather __ (get) colder and colder.（is getting）

附加問句 = 句尾的小問句，用來確認
規則：肯定句 → 否定尾巴 / 否定句 → 肯定尾巴
You are a student, aren't you?
She isn't coming, is she?
⚠️ 前肯後否，前否後肯！

be動詞的附加問句：
He is your brother, isn't he?
They aren't here, are they?
She was late, wasn't she?
回答：Yes, he is. / No, he isn't.
⚠️ 用同一個be動詞的肯/否定形式

一般動詞的附加問句 → 用do/does/did
You like music, don't you?
She speaks English, doesn't she?
They went home, didn't they?
⚠️ 三單現在用doesn't / 過去式用didn't

助動詞的附加問句：
You can swim, can't you?
She will come, won't she?
They should study, shouldn't they?
⚠️ 用同一個助動詞的肯/否定

特殊主詞的附加問句：
There is a cat, isn't there?（用there）
Everyone is here, aren't they?（everyone→they）
Nothing is wrong, is it?（nothing→否定→肯定尾巴）
Let's go, shall we?（Let's → shall we）

肯定附和：So + 助動詞/be + 主詞
I like pizza. → So do I.（我也是）
She is tired. → So am I.（我也是）
He can swim. → So can I.
⚠️ So do I = Me too.（口語版）

否定附和：Neither + 助動詞/be + 主詞
I don't like math. → Neither do I.（我也不）
She isn't happy. → Neither am I.
He can't cook. → Neither can I.
⚠️ Neither do I = Me neither.（口語版）

附加問句的回答看「事實」，不是看問法：
You don't like dogs, do you?
→ Yes, I do.（不，我喜歡）→ 事實是「喜歡」
→ No, I don't.（對，我不喜歡）→ 事實是「不喜歡」
⚠️ 中文和英文的Yes/No邏輯不同！

祈使句的附加問句：
肯定祈使：Open the door, will you?
否定祈使：Don't be late, will you?
Let's go, shall we?
Let me try, will you?
⚠️ 祈使句附加問句通常用 will you

填附加問句：
① She is a doctor, __ __?（isn't she）
② You don't like cats, __ __?（do you）
③ He can't swim, __ __?（can he）
④ Let's eat, __ __?（shall we）
⑤ There was a test, __ __?（wasn't there）

休閒活動：
movie（電影）/ concert（演唱會）/ exhibition（展覽）
camping（露營）/ hiking（健行）/ picnic（野餐）
barbecue（烤肉）/ karaoke（卡拉OK）
vacation（假期）/ trip（旅行）/ tour（導覽）/ adventure（冒險）

旅行計畫：
travel（旅行）/ visit（參觀/拜訪）/ sightseeing（觀光）
hotel（飯店）/ ticket（票）/ passport（護照）
luggage（行李）/ souvenir（紀念品）
schedule（行程表）/ reservation（預約）

節日活動：
holiday（假日）/ festival（節慶）/ celebrate（慶祝）
decorate（裝飾）/ fireworks（煙火）/ gift（禮物）
card（卡片）/ party（派對）
Christmas（聖誕節）/ New Year（新年）/ Halloween（萬聖節）

社團興趣：
join（加入）/ member（成員）/ practice（練習）
perform（表演）/ competition（比賽）/ award（獎項）
talent（才華）/ creative（有創意的）
volunteer（志工）/ community（社區）/ participate（參與）

科技娛樂：
smartphone（智慧型手機）/ tablet（平板）/ laptop（筆電）
internet（網路）/ website（網站）/ app（應用程式）
video（影片）/ stream（串流）/ download（下載）
social media（社群媒體）/ online（線上）/ digital（數位）

運動進階：
marathon（馬拉松）/ championship（錦標賽）/ athlete（運動員）
coach（教練）/ score（得分）/ goal（進球/目標）
team（隊伍）/ match（比賽）/ court（球場）/ field（場地）
win（贏）/ lose（輸）/ tie（平手）/ cheer（歡呼）/ champion（冠軍）

藝文活動：
painting（繪畫）/ drawing（素描）/ photography（攝影）
sculpture（雕塑）/ poem（詩）/ novel（小說）
drama（戲劇）/ performance（表演）
gallery（畫廊）/ stage（舞台）/ audience（觀眾）/ applause（掌聲）

短文：This weekend, I'm going to have a busy schedule（忙碌的行程）.
On Saturday, I will go hiking（健行）with my family.
In the afternoon, we're going to have a barbecue（烤肉）.
On Sunday, I plan to visit the museum（博物館）.
I can't wait!（等不及了！）

購物基礎：
shop / store（商店）/ mall（購物中心）/ market（市場）
price（價格）/ cost（費用）/ cheap（便宜）/ expensive（貴）
on sale（特價中）/ discount（折扣）
size（尺寸）/ color（顏色）/ style（風格）/ brand（品牌）

付款方式：
pay（付款）/ cash（現金）/ credit card（信用卡）
change（找零）/ receipt（收據）
charge（收費）/ afford（負擔得起）/ save（存錢）
budget（預算）/ wallet（錢包）
⚠️ pay for + 物品 / pay + 金額

衣物配件：
clothes（衣服）/ shirt（襯衫）/ pants（褲子）/ jeans（牛仔褲）
dress（洋裝）/ skirt（裙子）/ jacket（夾克）/ coat（外套）
sweater（毛衣）/ uniform（制服）
shoes（鞋子）/ sneakers（運動鞋）/ boots（靴子）
hat（帽子）/ scarf（圍巾）/ gloves（手套）

量詞與度量：
a pair of（一雙/副）/ a piece of（一片/張/件）
a bottle of（一瓶）/ a cup of（一杯）/ a bowl of（一碗）
a box of（一盒）
kilogram（公斤）/ meter（公尺）/ liter（公升）/ dozen（一打=12個）

殺價退換：
bargain（殺價/便宜貨）/ exchange（交換/退換）
refund（退款）/ return（退貨）
fit（合身）/ try on（試穿）/ pick up（拿取）
例：Can I try this on?（我可以試穿嗎？）
This doesn't fit.（這不合身）Can I exchange it?（可以換嗎？）

購物對話：
A: How much is this T-shirt?（這件T恤多少錢？）
B: It's 500 dollars. But it's on sale（特價中）today — 350.
A: That's a good deal!（好划算！）I'll take it.（我要了）
B: Cash or card?（現金還是刷卡？）
A: Card, please.（刷卡）

網路購物：
order（訂購）/ deliver（送貨）/ delivery（配送）
shipping（運費）/ package（包裹）
review（評論）/ rating（評分）/ add to cart（加入購物車）
checkout（結帳）/ free shipping（免運費）/ tracking number（追蹤編號）

零用錢理財：
allowance（零用錢）/ spend（花費）/ save（存錢）/ waste（浪費）
expense（開銷）/ earn（賺）/ donate（捐）/ pocket money（零用錢）
例：I save（存）half of my allowance（零用錢）every month.
She spent（花了）too much money on clothes（衣服）.

正面情緒：
happy（開心）/ glad（高興）/ excited（興奮）/ proud（驕傲）
satisfied（滿意）/ relaxed（放鬆）/ comfortable（舒服）
grateful（感恩）/ hopeful（充滿希望）
⚠️ excited（人感到興奮）/ exciting（事物令人興奮）

負面情緒：
sad（難過）/ angry（生氣）/ upset（不高興/沮喪）
disappointed（失望）/ frustrated（挫折）
anxious（焦慮）/ nervous（緊張）/ embarrassed（尷尬）
jealous（嫉妒）
⚠️ disappointed（人失望）/ disappointing（事令人失望）

-ed 形容詞 = 人的感受 / -ing 形容詞 = 事物的特質：
bored（無聊的→人）/ boring（無聊的→事物）
tired（疲倦）/ tiring（令人疲倦）
surprised（驚訝）/ surprising（令人驚訝）
confused（困惑）/ confusing（令人困惑）
例：The movie was boring（無聊的）. I was bored（感到無聊）.
⚠️ 會考超愛考這組！

表達情緒的句型：
I feel happy/sad/excited.（我感到…）
I'm worried about the test.（我擔心考試）
I'm afraid of spiders.（我怕蜘蛛）
He was surprised to see me.（他驚訝看到我）
⚠️ worried about / afraid of / surprised at

安慰用語：
Don't worry.（別擔心）/ It's OK.（沒關係）
Cheer up!（振作！）/ Take it easy.（放輕鬆）
Everything will be fine.（一切都會好的）
I'm here for you.（我在這裡陪你）

描述程度：
a little（有一點）/ kind of（有點→口語）/ quite（相當）
very（很）/ extremely（極度）
搭配：a little nervous（有點緊張）/ very excited（非常興奮）
例：I was kind of disappointed（有點失望）, but I'm OK now.

表達情緒原因：
because + 子句：I'm happy because I passed（通過）the test.
because of + 名詞：She was sad because of the bad news（壞消息）.
⚠️ because + 句子 / because of + 名詞

短文：Yesterday was a roller coaster day（像雲霄飛車的一天）.
In the morning, I was nervous（緊張）about the English test.
But after the test, I felt relieved（放心）.
At lunch, I was surprised（驚訝）to get a birthday card.
I was so touched（感動）! It was the best day ever.

身體部位：
head（頭）/ face（臉）/ eye（眼睛）/ ear（耳朵）/ nose（鼻子）/ mouth（嘴巴）
tooth（牙齒→複數teeth）/ neck（脖子）/ shoulder（肩膀）
arm（手臂）/ hand（手）/ finger（手指）
leg（腿）/ knee（膝蓋）/ foot（腳→複數feet）/ toe（腳趾）
back（背）/ stomach（胃/肚子）

症狀疾病：
headache（頭痛）/ stomachache（胃痛）/ toothache（牙痛）
fever（發燒）/ cold（感冒）/ cough（咳嗽）
sore throat（喉嚨痛）/ flu（流感）/ allergy（過敏）
dizzy（頭暈）/ weak（虛弱）/ pain（疼痛）/ hurt（受傷）
例：I have a headache（頭痛）and a sore throat（喉嚨痛）.

看醫生：
doctor（醫生）/ nurse（護士）/ hospital（醫院）/ clinic（診所）
patient（病人）/ medicine（藥）/ pill（藥丸）
rest（休息）/ check-up（檢查）/ injection（打針）
⚠️ take medicine（吃藥）→ 不是 eat medicine ❌

健康習慣：
exercise（運動）/ diet（飲食）/ nutrition（營養）
sleep（睡眠）/ hygiene（衛生）
healthy（健康的）/ fit（健康/合身）/ balanced（均衡的）
regular（規律的）
例：Eating a balanced diet（均衡飲食）is important for your health（健康）.

表達不舒服：
I have a cold.（我感冒了）/ I feel dizzy.（我頭暈）
My stomach hurts.（我胃痛）/ I've got a fever.（我發燒了）
What's wrong?（怎麼了？）/ What happened?（發生什麼事？）
回答：I don't feel well.（我不舒服）/ I feel sick.（我覺得不舒服）

看醫生對話：
A: You look pale（蒼白）. Are you OK?
B: I have a terrible headache（嚴重頭痛）.
A: You should take some medicine（吃藥）and rest（休息）.
B: Thanks. I'll go see a doctor（看醫生）after school.
A: Take care!（保重！）

現在完成式 = 過去發生，影響持續到現在
公式：S + have/has + p.p.（過去分詞）
I have lived here for ten years.（住了十年，現在還住）
⚠️ 過去式 = 結束了 / 完成式 = 跟現在有關

have + p.p.（I/You/We/They）
has + p.p.（He/She/It/人名）
I have finished my homework.
She has gone to Japan.
⚠️ 三單用 has，其他用 have

規則動詞p.p. = 跟過去式一樣加-ed：
played / watched / studied / stopped
不規則要另外背：
go→gone / eat→eaten / see→seen / write→written
⚠️ 三態：原形-過去式-過去分詞

AAA型（三態同形）：cut-cut-cut / put-put-put / read-read-read
ABB型（後兩態同）：buy-bought-bought / teach-taught-taught / think-thought-thought
make-made-made / tell-told-told / have-had-had

ABC型（三態不同）：
go-went-gone / eat-ate-eaten / see-saw-seen
write-wrote-written / take-took-taken
break-broke-broken / speak-spoke-spoken
know-knew-known / give-gave-given
⚠️ ABC型最難背，也最常考！

ever（曾經）/ never（從未）→ 問經驗
Have you ever been to Japan?
→ Yes, I have. / No, I never have.
I have never eaten sushi.
⚠️ ever用在問句 / never用在否定

already（已經）→ 肯定句
I have already finished.（我已經完成了）
yet（還）→ 否定句/問句
I haven't finished yet.（我還沒完成）
Have you eaten yet?（你吃了沒？）
⚠️ already放句中 / yet放句尾

just（剛剛）→ 剛完成的事
I have just arrived.（我剛到）
recently / lately（最近）
She has been busy recently.
⚠️ just放在have/has後面：have just + p.p.

since + 起點（自從）：since 2020 / since last year
for + 時間長度（持續）：for two years / for a long time
I have lived here since 2015.
I have lived here for ten years.
⚠️ since + 時間點 / for + 時間段

have been to = 去過（已經回來了）
I have been to Tokyo twice.（去過東京兩次）
have gone to = 已經去了（人不在這裡）
She has gone to Tokyo.（她去東京了，人在那邊）
⚠️ been to = 去過回來了 / gone to = 去了還沒回

完成式否定：S + have/has + not + p.p.
I haven't seen him today.
She hasn't finished the report yet.
⚠️ haven't = have not / hasn't = has not

完成式問句：Have/Has + S + p.p.?
Have you eaten lunch?
→ Yes, I have. / No, I haven't.
Has she ever been abroad?
→ Yes, she has.

完成式Wh-問句：
How long have you lived here? → For five years.
How many times have you been to Japan? → Twice.
What have you done today? → I've studied and exercised.

⚠️ 完成式 vs 過去式（超重要！）：
過去式：I lost my key yesterday.（昨天丟了→陳述事實）
完成式：I have lost my key.（丟了→現在還沒找到）
判斷：有明確過去時間 → 過去式 / 強調對現在影響 → 完成式
items.pushTitle: 完成式 vs 過去式

items.content:
完成式五大地雷：
❌ I have went → ✅ I have gone（用p.p.）
❌ She has eat → ✅ She has eaten
❌ I have been to there → ✅ I have been there（there是副詞）
❌ I have lived here since 3 years → ✅ for 3 years
❌ Yesterday I have seen → ✅ Yesterday I saw（有yesterday用過去式）

填空：
① I __ (live) here since 2018. → have lived
② She __ never __ (be) abroad. → has...been
③ __ you __ (finish) yet? → Have...finished
④ He __ just __ (leave). → has...left
⑤ How long __ they __ (know) each other? → have...known

被動語態 = 主詞是「被做」的對象
公式：S + be + p.p. (+ by + 行為者)
主動：Tom wrote this book.
被動：This book was written by Tom.
⚠️ 重點在「什麼被做了」，不是「誰做的」

現在式被動：S + am/is/are + p.p.
English is spoken in many countries.
These cars are made in Japan.
Rice is grown in Taiwan.
⚠️ 一般事實/習慣用現在式被動

過去式被動：S + was/were + p.p.
The window was broken yesterday.
The letters were sent last week.
America was discovered by Columbus.
⚠️ 過去的事件用過去式被動

未來式被動：S + will be + p.p.
The meeting will be held tomorrow.
A new school will be built next year.
⚠️ will be + p.p.（be不能省！）

完成式被動：S + have/has been + p.p.
The homework has been finished.
Many trees have been planted this year.
⚠️ have been + p.p.（三層結構）

被動否定：S + be + not + p.p.
The door wasn't locked.
被動問句：Be + S + p.p.?
Was the email sent? → Yes, it was.
Is English spoken here? → Yes, it is.

by + 行為者 常被省略的情況：
① 行為者不重要：English is spoken worldwide.（誰說不重要）
② 行為者不明：My bike was stolen.（不知道誰偷的）
③ 行為者很明顯：The criminal was arrested.（當然是警察）

主動 → 被動轉換步驟：
① 受詞變主詞
② 動詞改成 be + p.p.
③ 主詞變 by + 受格
例：She cleans the room.
→ The room is cleaned (by her).

助動詞 + be + p.p.：
The work must be done today.
The letter can be sent tomorrow.
This problem should be solved soon.
⚠️ 助動詞後面用原形be：can be / must be / should be

被動常見片語：
be made of（由...製成→看得出原料）
be made from（由...製成→看不出原料）
be known for（以...聞名）
be covered with（被...覆蓋）
be interested in（對...有興趣）

感官/情緒的被動表達：
I am interested in music.（我對音樂有興趣）
She was surprised at the news.（她對消息驚訝）
He is excited about the trip.（他對旅行興奮）
⚠️ 這些其實是「p.p.當形容詞」

It + be + p.p. + that子句：
It is said that he is very rich.（據說）
It is believed that exercise is good.（人們相信）
It is reported that the storm is coming.（據報導）
⚠️ 這是新聞/學術常見句型

被動語態四大地雷：
❌ The book written by her → ✅ was written（少be動詞）
❌ English is speak → ✅ is spoken（用p.p.）
❌ I was surprised → I am surprised（現在的感受用現在式）
❌ The door opened by him → ✅ was opened

改成被動：
① People speak English here. → English is spoken here.
② They built this bridge in 2010. → This bridge was built in 2010.
③ Someone has stolen my bike. → My bike has been stolen.
④ They will hold a meeting tomorrow. → A meeting will be held tomorrow.

關係代名詞 = 連接兩個句子，修飾名詞
who（人）/ which（物）/ that（人或物）
I know the girl. + She won the prize.
→ I know the girl who won the prize.
⚠️ 關係代名詞 = 形容詞子句的開頭

who = 代替「人」（當主詞）
The boy who is singing is my brother.
I have a friend who lives in Japan.
People who exercise regularly are healthier.
⚠️ who後面接動詞（who是主詞）

which = 代替「物/動物」
This is the book which I bought yesterday.
I like the movie which won the award.
The cat which is sleeping is mine.
⚠️ which可當主詞也可當受詞

that = 可以代替 who 或 which
The girl that won → 人（= who）
The book that I bought → 物（= which）
⚠️ that最萬用，口語中最常用
但某些情況不能用that（非限定子句）

關代當受詞時可以省略：
The book (which) I bought is great.
The man (who/whom) I met was kind.
⚠️ 當受詞 → 可省略 / 當主詞 → 不能省
The boy who is singing... → who不能省

whose = 誰的（所有格關代）
The boy whose father is a doctor...
= The boy—his father is a doctor...
I know a girl whose name is Amy.
⚠️ whose後面接名詞（whose + N）

where = 在那個地方
This is the school where I study.
when = 在那個時間
I remember the day when we first met.
⚠️ where = in which / when = at which

限定子句（沒逗號）→ 必要資訊，不能刪
The man who called you is my dad.
非限定子句（有逗號）→ 補充資訊，可刪
My dad, who is 50, is a teacher.
⚠️ 非限定子句不能用that！

偏好用 that 的情況：
① 先行詞是最高級：the best movie that...
② 先行詞有 all/every/the only：all that...
③ 先行詞是人+物：the boy and the dog that...
⚠️ 這些情境用that比who/which更自然
items.pushTitle: 偏好用 that 的情況

items.content:
介系詞 + 關代：
This is the house in which he lives.
= This is the house (which) he lives in.
⚠️ 正式寫法把介系詞放前面（in which）
口語通常放後面（which...in）或省略which

關代子句的動詞看「先行詞」：
The boy who is tall... → is（boy是單數）
The boys who are tall... → are（boys是複數）
I, who am your friend... → am（I）
⚠️ 動詞要跟先行詞一致，不是跟關代一致

用關代合併兩個句子：
① I met a girl. She speaks French.
→ I met a girl who speaks French.
② I bought a phone. It was cheap.
→ I bought a phone which was cheap.
步驟：找重複→用關代取代→合併

關代四大地雷：
❌ The boy who he is tall → ✅ who is tall（不重複主詞）
❌ I know a girl which → ✅ who（人用who）
❌ The book who → ✅ which/that（物不用who）
❌ My mom, that is a nurse → ✅ who（非限定不用that）

填who/which/that/whose：
① The man __ called you is my uncle.（who/that）
② The movie __ we saw was great.（which/that/省略）
③ I have a friend __ brother is a singer.（whose）
④ This is the restaurant __ I often go to.（which/that/省略）

that子句當受詞（最常見）：
I think (that) she is right.
I know (that) he likes music.
I believe (that) we can win.
I hope (that) you will come.
⚠️ 口語中that常省略
items.pushTitle: I think that... 名詞子句

items.content:
間接問句 = 把問句放進句子裡
直接：Where does he live?
間接：I know where he lives.
⚠️ 間接問句用「肯定句語序」！
where he lives ✅ / where does he live ❌（在句中時）

Wh-間接問句：
I don't know what she wants.
Can you tell me where the station is?
Do you know when he will come?
I wonder why she is angry.
⚠️ 疑問詞後面接「主詞+動詞」（正常語序）

if / whether = 是否
I don't know if he will come.
= I don't know whether he will come.
Can you tell me if/whether this is right?
⚠️ if = whether（是否）≠ if（如果）→ 看語境判斷

間接問句碰到助動詞：
直接：What can I do?
間接：I don't know what I can do.
直接：Where should we go?
間接：Tell me where we should go.
⚠️ 助動詞留在主詞後面（正常語序）

that子句當主詞：
That he is honest is true.
→ It is true that he is honest.（用It代替比較自然）
It is important that you study hard.
⚠️ That開頭太重→用It is...that改寫

接名詞子句的常見動詞：
think / know / believe / hope / wish
find / discover / notice / hear / feel
tell / show / ask / remind
例：I didn't notice that she had left.

⚠️ 直接問句 vs 間接問句語序：
直接：Where is the bank?（倒裝：is在where後）
間接：Do you know where the bank is?（正常：the bank is）
直接：What did she buy?（did在she前）
間接：I wonder what she bought.（she bought正常序）
items.pushTitle: 直接 vs 間接語序

items.content:
ask的兩種用法：
① ask + sb + to V：I asked him to help me.
② ask + 間接問句：I asked him where he lived.
例：She asked me if I was hungry.
⚠️ 轉述問句用間接問句語序

名詞子句/間接問句地雷：
❌ I know where is he → ✅ I know where he is
❌ Tell me what do you want → ✅ what you want
❌ I wonder that she is OK → ✅ I wonder if she is OK
⚠️ 間接問句最常錯 = 忘記改成正常語序

轉述他人的話：
直接引述：She said, "I am tired."
間接引述：She said (that) she was tired.
⚠️ 時態要退一步：am→was / will→would
（認識即可，不需深入）

改成間接問句：
① Where does she live? → I don't know where she lives.
② Is he coming? → I wonder if he is coming.
③ What time does the movie start? → Can you tell me what time the movie starts?
④ "I like dogs." She said... → She said (that) she liked dogs.

使役動詞 = 叫/讓/使某人做某事
make / let / have + O + 原形V
Mom made me clean my room.（媽媽叫我打掃房間）
Let me help you.（讓我幫你）
⚠️ 使役動詞後面接原形，不加to！

make + O + 原形V = 使/迫使某人做
The movie made me cry.（這部電影讓我哭了）
Don't make me laugh.（別讓我笑）
make + O + adj = 使某人處於某狀態
The news made her happy.
⚠️ make也可接形容詞！

let + O + 原形V = 讓/允許某人做
Let me try again.（讓我再試一次）
My parents let me stay up late.
否定：Don't let him go.
⚠️ let + O + V（原形！）let him to go ❌

have + O + 原形V = 叫/要某人做（較客氣）
I'll have someone fix it.（我會叫人修）
have + O + p.p. = 請人做（被動概念）
I had my hair cut.（我去剪了頭髮→請人剪的）
⚠️ have sth done = 請別人做

get + O + to V = 說服/叫某人做（要加to！）
I got him to help me.（我說服他幫我）
⚠️ get 跟 make/let/have 不同 → 要加 to！
make him help ✅ / get him to help ✅
get him help ❌

感官動詞 = 看/聽/感覺到某人做某事
see / hear / watch / notice / feel
+ O + 原形V（看到全程）
+ O + V-ing（看到正在做）
I saw him cross the street.（看到他過馬路→全程）
I saw him crossing the street.（看到他正在過）

感官動詞 + O + V → 強調「全部過程」
I heard her sing a song.（聽到她唱完一首歌）
+ O + V-ing → 強調「正在進行」
I heard her singing.（聽到她正在唱）
⚠️ 考試常考這組差異！
items.pushTitle: 原形V vs V-ing 差異

items.content:
使役/感官動詞被動語態 → 要還原to：
主動：Mom made me study.（make + O + V）
被動：I was made to study by Mom.（加to！）
主動：I saw him leave.
被動：He was seen to leave.（加to！）
⚠️ 被動時原形V要加to

help + O + (to) V → to可加可不加
She helped me (to) carry the box.
Can you help me (to) find my keys?
⚠️ help是唯一 to 可省可不省的動詞
其他要嘛一定要to（get），要嘛一定不要（make/let）

填空：
① Mom made me __ (clean) my room.（clean）
② I saw her __ (walk) into the store.（walk / walking）
③ Please let me __ (go).（go）
④ I got him __ (help) me.（to help）
⑤ The song made me __ (happy).（happy）

環保基礎：
environment（環境）/ pollution（污染）/ recycle（回收）
waste（廢棄物）/ trash（垃圾）/ reduce（減少）
reuse（重複使用）/ protect（保護）/ save（節約）/ energy（能源）
⚠️ 3R: Reduce（減少）, Reuse（重複使用）, Recycle（回收）

自然環境：
earth（地球）/ nature（大自然）/ forest（森林）/ ocean（海洋）
river（河流）/ lake（湖泊）/ mountain（山）/ island（島嶼）
desert（沙漠）/ climate（氣候）/ weather（天氣）

環境問題：
global warming（全球暖化）/ greenhouse effect（溫室效應）
carbon（碳）/ plastic（塑膠）/ chemical（化學物質）
endangered（瀕臨絕種的）/ extinct（絕種的）
drought（乾旱）/ flood（洪水）/ typhoon（颱風）/ earthquake（地震）

綠色行動：
solar energy（太陽能）/ wind power（風力）/ electric car（電動車）
organic（有機的）/ eco-friendly（環保的）/ sustainable（永續的）
plant trees（種樹）/ save water（省水）/ turn off lights（關燈）

動物保育：
wildlife（野生動物）/ habitat（棲息地）/ species（物種）
ecosystem（生態系統）/ protect（保護）/ conserve（保育）
volunteer（志工）/ donate（捐贈）
nature reserve（自然保留區）/ national park（國家公園）

節能減碳：
carbon footprint（碳足跡）/ emission（排放）/ fuel（燃料）
resource（資源）/ recyclable（可回收的）
biodegradable（可生物分解的）/ compost（堆肥）
public transportation（大眾運輸）/ carpool（共乘）

環保標語：
Save the Earth!（救救地球！）/ Go green!（愛護環境！）
Every little bit helps.（積少成多）
Reduce, Reuse, Recycle.（減量、重複使用、回收）
There is no Planet B.（地球只有一個）
Think globally, act locally.（放眼全球，在地行動）

短文：Our planet（地球）has been seriously polluted（嚴重污染）.
Many forests（森林）have been destroyed（被破壞）.
The ocean is filled with plastic waste（塑膠垃圾）.
We must take action（採取行動）now.
If everyone recycles（回收）and saves energy（節能）,
we can make a difference!（我們能有所改變！）

電子產品：
computer（電腦）/ laptop（筆電）/ tablet（平板）
smartphone（智慧型手機）/ headphones（耳機）/ speaker（喇叭）
camera（相機）/ printer（印表機）
charger（充電器）/ battery（電池）/ screen（螢幕）/ keyboard（鍵盤）

網路社群：
internet（網路）/ website（網站）/ app（應用程式）
social media（社群媒體）/ blog（部落格）/ vlog（影音部落格）
podcast（播客）/ online（線上）/ offline（離線）
follow（追蹤）/ share（分享）/ post（貼文）/ comment（留言）/ like（按讚）

科技動詞：
download（下載）/ upload（上傳）/ search（搜尋）/ click（點擊）
log in（登入）/ install（安裝）/ update（更新）/ connect（連接）
program（程式設計）/ design（設計）
invent（發明）/ create（創造）/ develop（開發）/ improve（改善）

AI與未來：
AI = artificial intelligence（人工智慧）/ robot（機器人）
automation（自動化）/ virtual reality（虛擬實境）
self-driving car（自動駕駛車）/ drone（無人機）
例：It is believed that AI（人工智慧）will change our lives（改變我們的生活）.

媒體素養：
news（新聞）/ report（報導）/ journalist（記者）
headline（標題）/ article（文章）
fake news（假新聞）/ fact（事實）/ opinion（意見）
source（來源）/ reliable（可靠的）
⚠️ fact（事實）vs opinion（意見）→ 會考閱讀常考

網路安全：
password（密碼）/ privacy（隱私）/ personal information（個人資訊）
cyberbullying（網路霸凌）/ hacker（駭客）/ virus（病毒）/ scam（詐騙）
例：Don't share（分享）your password（密碼）with anyone.

科技利弊：
advantage（優點）/ disadvantage（缺點）/ convenient（方便的）
addicted（上癮的）/ communication（溝通）
efficiency（效率）/ distraction（分心）
例：Some people are addicted to（沉迷於）their phones（手機）.

短文：Technology（科技）has changed our lives（改變了生活）a lot.
We can search for（搜尋）information（資訊）online（線上）quickly.
We can also communicate with（溝通）people worldwide（全球）.
However, we should not spend too much time on screens（螢幕）.
It is important that we use technology wisely（明智地使用科技）.

職業名稱①：
doctor（醫生）/ nurse（護士）/ teacher（老師）
engineer（工程師）/ lawyer（律師）/ scientist（科學家）
artist（藝術家）/ musician（音樂家）/ writer（作家）
chef（主廚）/ pilot（機師）/ firefighter（消防員）/ police officer（警察）

職業名稱②：
programmer（程式設計師）/ designer（設計師）
photographer（攝影師）/ journalist（記者）
athlete（運動員）/ actor（演員）/ singer（歌手）
YouTuber（YouTuber）/ businessperson（商人）
salesperson（業務員）/ tour guide（導遊）

職場動詞：
work（工作）/ earn（賺錢）/ hire（雇用）/ employ（雇用）
manage（管理）/ lead（領導）/ cooperate（合作）
communicate（溝通）/ create（創造）/ present（報告/呈現）
negotiate（協商）/ organize（組織）/ achieve（達成）

職業特質：
professional（專業的）/ experienced（有經驗的）/ creative（有創意的）
responsible（負責任的）/ skillful（有技術的）
patient（有耐心的）/ hard-working（勤勞的）/ reliable（可靠的）
leadership（領導力）/ teamwork（團隊合作）/ problem-solving（解決問題）

夢想表達：
dream（夢想）/ goal（目標）/ ambition（抱負）/ passion（熱情）
future（未來）/ achieve（達成）/ pursue（追求）
give up（放棄）/ work hard（努力工作）
believe in（相信）/ look forward to（期待）

面試對話：
Q: What do you want to be in the future?（你未來想當什麼？）
A: I want to be an engineer（工程師）who designs robots（設計機器人）.
Q: Why?（為什麼？）
A: Because I'm interested in（對...有興趣）science and technology（科學和科技）.
I believe that hard work（努力）can make dreams come true（實現夢想）.

職業探索：
internship（實習）/ part-time job（兼職）/ experience（經驗）
skill（技能）/ certificate（證照）/ qualification（資格）
salary（薪水）
例：Getting an internship（取得實習）is a good way to explore careers（探索職涯）.

短文：My dream（夢想）is to become a doctor（醫生）.
A doctor is someone who saves lives（拯救生命）.
I know that it takes many years of study（需要多年學習）.
But I will never give up（放棄）.
I believe if I work hard enough（夠努力）,
I can make it!（我能做到！）

社會參與：
volunteer（志工）/ charity（慈善）/ donate（捐贈）
community（社區）/ service（服務）/ organization（組織）
campaign（活動/運動）/ support（支持）

平等尊重：
equal（平等的）/ fair（公平的）/ respect（尊重）
diversity（多元）/ inclusion（包容）
rights（權利）/ freedom（自由）/ justice（正義）/ discrimination（歧視）

多元文化：
culture（文化）/ tradition（傳統）/ custom（習俗）/ festival（節慶）
foreign（外國的）/ international（國際的）/ global（全球的）
exchange（交流）
例：Learning about different cultures（不同文化）makes us more open-minded（心胸開闊）.

公民素養：
responsible（負責任的）/ citizen（公民）/ law（法律）/ rule（規則）
duty（責任）/ vote（投票）/ opinion（意見）
debate（辯論）/ protest（抗議）/ democracy（民主）

媒體識讀：
media（媒體）/ information（資訊）/ critical thinking（批判思考）
source（來源）/ influence（影響）/ persuade（說服）
advertise（廣告宣傳）/ propaganda（宣傳/洗腦）

短文：In today's world, many social issues（社會議題）need our attention（關注）.
Some people are not treated fairly（公平對待）because of their background（背景）.
We should respect（尊重）everyone and fight for equality（平等）.
As students（學生）, we can start by volunteering（當志工）in our community（社區）.
Small actions can make a big difference.（小小行動能帶來大改變）

過去完成式 = 過去的過去
公式：S + had + p.p.
用來表示「在過去某時間點之前就已經發生的事」
When I arrived, the movie had already started.
⚠️ 過去完成式一定跟另一個「過去式」搭配使用

had + p.p.（所有主詞都用 had）
I had finished homework before dinner.
She had never been abroad before last year.
⚠️ had 沒有人稱變化！不像 have/has

before/after + 過去式，主句用過去完成式：
I had eaten before he came.
= Before he came, I had eaten.
After she had left, I called her.
⚠️ 先發生 → had+p.p. / 後發生 → 過去式

by the time + 過去式, 主句 had + p.p.
By the time I got home, Mom had cooked dinner.
By the time we arrived, the train had left.
⚠️ by the time = 到…的時候（暗示已經太遲）

三大時間連接詞搭配：
After I had studied, I went to bed.（先讀書後睡覺）
When I arrived, she had already left.（我到時她已走）
I had never seen snow before I went to Japan.（去日本前沒見過雪）

否定：S + had not / hadn't + p.p.
I hadn't finished when the bell rang.
問句：Had + S + p.p.?
Had you eaten before the party?
→ Yes, I had. / No, I hadn't.

過去式 vs 過去完成式：
過去式：I lost my key.（丟了→陳述事實）
過去完成式：I had lost my key before I left.（離開前就丟了→時間先後）
⚠️ 如果只是敘述過去事件，不需要用過去完成式！只有強調「更早」時才用
items.pushTitle: 過去式 vs 過去完成

items.content:
三大完成式比較：
現在完成：I have lived here since 2020.（到現在）
過去完成：I had lived there for 5 years before I moved.（到過去某點）
未來完成*：I will have finished by tomorrow.（到未來某點）
⚠️ 未來完成認識即可

六大時態一覽：
現在簡單：I eat / She eats
過去簡單：I ate
未來簡單：I will eat
現在進行：I am eating
現在完成：I have eaten
過去完成：I had eaten
⚠️ 國中六大時態，全部到齊！

時態選擇判斷法：
① 看時間詞：every day→現在 / yesterday→過去 / tomorrow→未來
② 看語境：正在→進行 / 已完成→完成 / 更早→過去完成
③ 看標記詞：since/for→完成 / ago→過去 / will→未來

混合時態練習：
I (live) in Taipei since 2018. → have lived
She (go) to Japan last year. → went
By the time I arrived, he (leave). → had left
They (play) basketball now. → are playing
We (visit) the museum tomorrow. → will visit

wish + 過去式 = 希望（跟現在事實相反）
I wish I were taller.（希望我更高→但我不高）
I wish I had a car.（希望有車→但沒有）
⚠️ wish後面不管主詞，be動詞都用were（正式）

過去完成式/時態整合常見錯誤：
❌ When I arrived, the movie already started → ✅ had already started
❌ I have been there yesterday → ✅ I went there yesterday（有yesterday用過去式）
❌ I wish I am rich → ✅ I wish I were rich

選正確時態：
① She __ (already/eat) when I called. → had already eaten
② I __ (live) here for 10 years. → have lived
③ He __ (study) English since he was 10. → has studied
④ By the time we got there, the show __ (start). → had started
⑤ I wish I __ (can) fly. → could

V-ing 當形容詞放名詞前面或後面：
The sleeping baby is cute.（在睡的嬰兒）
The girl standing there is my sister.（站在那的女孩）
⚠️ V-ing 描述「主動/正在進行的」特質

p.p. 當形容詞：
The broken window needs to be fixed.（被打破的窗）
The book written by her is popular.（被她寫的書）
⚠️ p.p. 描述「被動/已完成的」特質

情緒形容詞：-ed = 人的感受 / -ing = 事物的特質
bored/boring / excited/exciting / tired/tiring
surprised/surprising / interested/interesting
例：The movie is boring. I am bored.
⚠️ 八上教過，九上深化+衝刺

分詞片語 = 用分詞開頭的片語修飾名詞：
The man wearing glasses is my teacher.
= The man who is wearing glasses...
The letter written in English is from Amy.
= The letter which was written in English...
⚠️ 分詞片語 = 省略版的關代子句

分詞構句 = 用V-ing/p.p.開頭簡化副詞子句：
Seeing the dog, she screamed.
= When she saw the dog, she screamed.
Exhausted, he fell asleep immediately.
= Because he was exhausted, he fell asleep.
⚠️ 認識即可，會考偶爾出現在閱讀題

with + O + V-ing/p.p. = 附帶狀況
She sat there with her eyes closed.（閉著眼）
He walked in with a dog following him.（狗跟著）
⚠️ 主動用V-ing / 被動用p.p.

keep / leave + O + V-ing/p.p.：
Don't keep me waiting.（別讓我等）
She left the door open.（她讓門開著）
I found the window broken.（我發現窗戶破了）
⚠️ keep/leave/find + O + 分詞 = 使某物處於某狀態

spend/waste + 時間/金錢 + V-ing：
I spent two hours studying.（花兩小時讀書）
Don't waste time playing games.（別浪費時間打電動）
She spent $500 buying shoes.
⚠️ 這裡的V-ing = 動名詞（八上教過），九上整合應用

分詞和關代可以互換：
The boy who is playing basketball → The boy playing basketball
The cake which was made by Mom → The cake made by Mom
⚠️ 主動→V-ing / 被動→p.p. / 省略who/which+be

分詞常見錯誤：
❌ The boring student fell asleep → ✅ The bored student（人用-ed）
❌ I am interesting in science → ✅ interested in
❌ Seen the movie, I cried → ✅ Seeing（主動用V-ing）
❌ The breaking cup → ✅ The broken cup（被打破→用p.p.）

選V-ing或p.p.：
① The __ (excite) children ran to the playground. → excited
② This is an __ (amaze) story. → amazing
③ The man __ (sit) on the bench is my dad. → sitting
④ __ (write) in English, the letter was hard to read. → Written

改寫成分詞片語：
① The girl who is dancing is Amy. → The girl dancing is Amy.
② The car which was parked here is gone. → The car parked here is gone.
③ Because I was tired, I went to bed early. → (Being) Tired, I went to bed early.
④ I know the boy who is wearing a red hat. → ...wearing a red hat.

假設語氣 = 說「跟事實相反」的假設
If + S + 過去式, S + would + V
If I were rich, I would travel the world.
（事實：我不有錢→假設如果有錢的話）
⚠️ 動詞退一步（現在→過去），暗示「不是事實」

if子句用過去式（但不是說過去的事！）：
If I had more time, I would read more books.
If she knew the answer, she would tell you.
⚠️ if子句的過去式 = 跟「現在」事實相反
不是跟「過去」事實相反！

假設語氣中be動詞一律用 were（正式）：
If I were you, I would apologize.（如果我是你，我會道歉）
If she were here, she would help us.（如果她在的話，她會幫我們）
⚠️ 口語中有人用 was 取代 were，但考試一律寫 were！
If I were rich... ✅（考試標準答案）

主句可用 would / could / might：
would = 就會：If I were rich, I would buy a house.
could = 就能：If I had wings, I could fly.
might = 可能會：If it rained, we might stay home.
⚠️ 三個都表示「假設情況下的結果」

I wish + 過去式 = 希望（但做不到）
I wish I were taller.（希望更高→但不高）
I wish I had a million dollars.（希望有百萬→但沒有）
I wish I could speak French.（希望會說→但不會）
⚠️ wish = 許願（跟事實相反的願望）

If only = I wish 的加強版（更強烈的願望）
If only I were smarter!
If only she were here!
= I wish she were here!（但她不在）
⚠️ If only 語氣更強、更感嘆

⚠️ 假設語氣 vs 一般條件句：
一般條件：If it rains, I will stay home.（有可能下雨→現在式+will）
假設語氣：If it rained now, I would stay home.（現在沒下雨→過去式+would）
判斷：有可能發生 → 一般條件 / 不太可能 → 假設
items.pushTitle: 假設 vs 一般條件

items.content:
as if / as though = 好像（但不是事實）
She talks as if she were the boss.（好像她是老闆→但不是）
He acts as if he knew everything.
⚠️ as if 後面用過去式 = 暗示「不是事實」

without + N = if...not 的替代：
Without water, we couldn't survive.
= If there were no water, we couldn't survive.
Without your help, I would have failed.
⚠️ without 可以取代 if...not

假設語氣五大地雷：
❌ If I am rich, I would... → ✅ If I were rich（假設用過去式）
❌ If I were you, I will... → ✅ I would（主句用would）
❌ I wish I can fly → ✅ I wish I could fly
❌ She acts as if she is → ✅ as if she were
❌ If I would have... → ✅ If I had（if子句不用would）

假設語氣常考情境：
If I were the president, I would...
If I could go anywhere, I would go to...
I wish our school had a swimming pool.
If only the test were easier!
⚠️ 會考/段考常出「如果你是...你會怎麼做？」

填空：
① If I __ (be) a bird, I __ (fly) to Paris. → were / would fly
② I wish I __ (have) more free time. → had
③ If she __ (know) the truth, she __ (be) angry. → knew / would be
④ He talks as if he __ (be) an expert. → were
⑤ Without music, life __ (be) boring. → would be

although / though = 雖然（讓步）
Although it was raining, we still went out.
= We went out although it was raining.
⚠️ although 和 but 不能同時用！
Although...but... ❌ → 選一個就好

even though = 即使（事實）
Even though she was sick, she came to school.
even if = 即使（假設）
Even if it rains, I will go.
⚠️ even though = 已發生 / even if = 可能發生

so + adj/adv + that = 如此...以至於
She was so tired that she fell asleep.
He ran so fast that no one could catch him.
⚠️ so修飾形容詞/副詞

such + (a/an) + adj + N + that = 如此...以至於
It was such a beautiful day that we went hiking.
They are such good students that the teacher is proud.
⚠️ such修飾名詞（前面有形容詞+名詞）

unless = if...not = 除非
Unless you study, you won't pass.
= If you don't study, you won't pass.
I won't go unless you come with me.
⚠️ unless = 除非...否則 = if not

so that = 為了（目的）+ 子句
I study hard so that I can pass the test.
in order to = 為了 + 動詞
I study hard in order to pass the test.
⚠️ so that + 子句 / in order to + V

not only A but also B = 不但A而且B
She is not only smart but also kind.
Not only did he sing, but he also danced.
⚠️ Not only放句首時要倒裝：Not only did he...
（認識即可）

whether A or B = 不管A還是B
Whether you like it or not, you have to go.
I don't know whether to go or stay.
⚠️ whether...or 可引導名詞子句或副詞子句

副詞子句連接詞大全：
時間：when/while/before/after/until/as soon as
原因：because/since/as
讓步：although/even though
條件：if/unless
結果：so...that/such...that
目的：so that/in order that
⚠️ 九年級總整理，分類記更有效！

填連接詞：
① __ he is young, he is very mature.（Although）
② She was __ tired __ she couldn't move.（so...that）
③ I'll wait __ you come back.（until）
④ __ you hurry, you'll miss the bus.（Unless）
⑤ He studies hard __ __ he can get into college.（so that）

It 當虛主詞的進階用法：
It takes time to learn a language.
It is no use crying over spilled milk.
It seems that he is angry.
It is said that she moved abroad.
⚠️ It 代替後面的真正主詞（to V / that子句）

反身代名詞 = ...自己
myself / yourself / himself / herself / itself
ourselves / yourselves / themselves
例：I taught myself English.（我自學英文）
Help yourself!（自己來！）
She hurt herself.（她傷了自己）

反身代名詞兩種用法：
① 強調：I myself don't believe it.（我本人不信）
② 受詞=主詞：She looked at herself in the mirror.
by oneself = alone = 獨自
I did it by myself.（我自己做的）

不定代名詞：
one = 一個（泛指）/ another = 另一個（不特定）
the other = 另一個（特定，兩者中的另一個）
I have two cats. One is white, and the other is black.
Can I have another cup of tea?（再來一杯）

others = 其他的（不特定複數）
the others = 其餘的（特定複數）
Some students like math; others prefer English.
There are 30 students. Five left; the others stayed.
⚠️ 有the = 特定 / 沒the = 不特定

兩者：
both = 兩者都：Both of them are smart.
either = 兩者其一：Either one is fine.
neither = 兩者都不：Neither answer is correct.
⚠️ both + 複數V / either/neither + 單數V

三者以上：
all = 全部：All of us are here.
some = 一些：Some are good; some are not.
none = 沒有一個：None of them came.
⚠️ none + 單數V（正式）或複數V（口語都接受）

填代名詞：
① I have two dogs. __ is big and __ __ is small.（One / the other）
② She finished the work by __.（herself）
③ __ of the two answers is right.（Neither）
④ Some students passed; __ failed.（others）
⑤ __ is important to be kind.（It）

經驗記憶：
experience（經驗/經歷）/ memory（記憶/回憶）/ impression（印象）
childhood（童年）/ meaningful（有意義的）/ unforgettable（難忘的）
precious（珍貴的）/ valuable（有價值的）
例：Traveling gives us valuable（有價值的）experiences.

決定壓力：
decision（決定）/ choice（選擇）/ pressure（壓力）
stress（壓力）/ challenge（挑戰）
difficult（困難的）/ complicated（複雜的）
anxious（焦慮的）/ confused（困惑的）

成功失敗：
success（成功）/ failure（失敗）/ effort（努力）
achievement（成就）/ goal（目標）
hard-working（勤勞的）/ persistent（堅持不懈的）
give up（放棄）/ keep going（繼續前進）

思考觀點：
opinion（意見）/ thought（想法）/ idea（點子/想法）
view（看法）/ perspective（觀點）
agree（同意）/ disagree（不同意）/ argue（爭論）
discuss（討論）/ debate（辯論）

情感深度：
trust（信任）/ loyalty（忠誠）/ gratitude（感恩）
sympathy（同情）/ empathy（同理心）
forgive（原諒）/ regret（後悔）/ appreciate（感激/欣賞）/ admire（欽佩）

性格進階：
ambitious（有野心的）/ optimistic（樂觀的）/ pessimistic（悲觀的）
mature（成熟的）/ independent（獨立的）/ humble（謙虛的）
arrogant（傲慢的）/ sensitive（敏感的）

人生態度：
attitude（態度）/ value（價值觀）/ principle（原則）
belief（信念）/ purpose（目的）
motivation（動機）/ inspiration（靈感/激勵）
role model（榜樣）/ influence（影響）

短文：If I could go back in time（回到過去）, I would tell my younger self（年幼的自己）:
Don't be afraid of failure（失敗）.
Every experience（經歷）, good or bad, teaches you something.
I wish I had known this earlier（更早知道）.
But it's never too late to learn.（學習永不嫌遲）

世界節慶：
Chinese New Year（農曆新年）/ Lantern Festival（元宵節）
Dragon Boat Festival（端午節）/ Mid-Autumn Festival（中秋節）
Christmas（聖誕節）/ Halloween（萬聖節）
Thanksgiving（感恩節）/ Easter（復活節）/ Valentine's Day（情人節）

節慶活動：
celebrate（慶祝）/ decorate（裝飾）/ parade（遊行）
ceremony（典禮）/ fireworks（煙火）/ lantern（燈籠）
costume（服裝/裝扮）/ trick-or-treat（不給糖就搗蛋）
feast（盛宴）/ reunion（團圓）/ pray（祈禱）/ worship（祭拜）

文化交流：
culture（文化）/ tradition（傳統）/ custom（習俗）
heritage（遺產）/ symbol（象徵）
exchange（交流）/ communication（溝通）
understanding（理解）/ diversity（多元性）

禮儀習俗：
manner（禮儀/態度）/ polite（有禮貌）/ rude（粗魯）
greeting（問候）/ bow（鞠躬）/ handshake（握手）
taboo（禁忌）/ superstition（迷信）
lucky（幸運的）/ unlucky（不幸的）

飲食文化：
cuisine（美食/料理）/ recipe（食譜）/ ingredient（食材）
flavor（味道/風味）/ spicy（辣的）
street food（街頭小吃）/ vegetarian（素食者/素食的）
local（在地的）/ traditional（傳統的）

旅遊文化：
tourist（觀光客）/ attraction（景點）/ landmark（地標）
temple（寺廟）/ palace（宮殿）
historical（歷史的）/ ancient（古老的）/ scenery（風景）/ souvenir（紀念品）

信仰價值：
religion（宗教）/ faith（信仰）/ spiritual（精神的/心靈的）
philosophy（哲學）/ moral（道德的）
tolerance（包容）/ harmony（和諧）/ peace（和平）/ compassion（慈悲）

短文：If you visited Taiwan（台灣）, you would be amazed（驚嘆）by its culture.
From night markets（夜市）to temples（寺廟）, there is so much to explore（探索）.
Taiwanese people are known for their friendliness（友善）.
I wish more people could experience（體驗）our culture.
It is truly one of a kind!（真的獨一無二！）

學術動詞：
compare（比較）/ contrast（對比）/ describe（描述）
explain（解釋）/ summarize（摘要）
analyze（分析）/ evaluate（評估）/ define（定義）/ conclude（結論）

論述連接詞：
according to（根據）/ for example（例如）/ in addition（此外）
however（然而）/ therefore（因此）
on the other hand（另一方面）/ in conclusion（總結來說）

考試詞彙：
test（測驗）/ exam（考試）/ quiz（小考）/ score（分數）
grade（成績/等級）/ pass（及格）/ fail（不及格）
review（複習）/ prepare（準備）/ practice（練習）
improve（進步）/ progress（進展）

圖表判讀：
chart（圖表）/ graph（曲線圖）/ table（表格）/ data（數據）
percentage（百分比）/ survey（調查）
increase（增加）/ decrease（減少）/ remain（維持）
rise（上升）/ fall（下降）

寫作結構用語：
topic（主題）/ paragraph（段落）/ introduction（引言）
body（主體）/ conclusion（結論）
thesis（論點）/ support（支持）/ argument（論述）
evidence（證據）/ example（例子）

短文：Preparing for exams（準備考試）requires both effort（努力）and strategy（策略）.
First, review（複習）your notes regularly（規律地）.
Second, practice（練習）with past exam papers.
Finally, get enough sleep（充足睡眠）the night before.
If you follow these steps, you will do well!（你會考好的！）

時態易混辨析：
① 現在簡單 vs 現在完成：I live here for 5 years ❌ → I have lived ✅（持續→完成式）
② 過去簡單 vs 現在完成：I have been to Japan last year ❌ → I went ✅（有明確過去時間→過去式）
③ 過去簡單 vs 過去完成：When I arrived, he left ❌ → had left ✅（更早→過去完成）
④ 現在進行 vs 現在簡單：I am liking it ❌ → I like it ✅（狀態動詞不用進行式）
⑤ 未來 will vs be going to：計畫好→be going to / 臨時決定→will
⑥ 現在完成 vs 過去完成：have p.p.（到現在）vs had p.p.（到過去某點）
⚠️ 六大時態選擇法：看時間詞 + 看語境 + 看標記詞

主動 vs 被動易混：
① The book writes by her ❌ → was written ✅（書被寫）
② English is spoke ❌ → is spoken ✅（用p.p.）
③ I was surprised at / The news was surprising ✅
⚠️ 判斷：主詞是「做」的人→主動 / 「被做」的→被動

to V vs V-ing 混用陷阱：
① enjoy + V-ing ✅ / enjoy + to V ❌
② want + to V ✅ / want + V-ing ❌
③ stop to V ≠ stop V-ing
④ remember to V（記得要做）≠ remember V-ing（記得做過）
⚠️ 會考必考！
items.pushTitle: to V vs V-ing 陷阱

items.content:
連接詞易混：
① although ≠ but（不能同時用）
② because ≠ so（不能同時用）
③ unless = if...not
④ even though（事實）vs even if（假設）
⑤ whether（是否）vs if（如果/是否→看語境）

代名詞易混：
① it's vs its：It's raining.（它是=it is）/ The dog wagged its tail.（它的尾巴）
② their vs there vs they're：Their house（他們的房子）/ over there（那邊）/ They're happy.（他們是=they are）
③ who vs whom：Who called you?（誰打給你→主格）/ Whom did you call?（你打給誰→受格）
④ one/another/the other：I have two cats. One is black, and the other is white.
⚠️ 選擇題最愛考的混淆組！

介系詞高頻易混：
① for + 時間段 vs since + 時間點：I've lived here for 3 years. / I've lived here since 2023.
② in/on/at 時間：at 7:00 / on Monday / in May
③ by bus（搭公車）vs on the bus（在公車上）
④ be made of（看得出原料：made of wood）vs be made from（看不出：made from grapes）
⑤ be used to V-ing（習慣做）vs used to V（過去常做）：I'm used to getting up early. / I used to play basketball.
⚠️ 每組都有例句對比才不會搞混！

助動詞語意辨析：
① must = 一定要（義務）/ 一定是（推測）
② can = 能夠 / 可以
③ may = 可以（許可）/ 可能（推測）
④ should = 應該（建議）
⑤ mustn't（禁止）vs don't have to（不必）→ 差很大！

條件句 vs 假設語氣（終極辨析）：
條件：If it rains, I will stay home.（可能下雨）
假設：If it rained, I would stay home.（現在沒下雨）
⚠️ 判斷法：可能發生→現在式+will / 不太可能→過去式+would
items.pushTitle: 條件 vs 假設終極辨

items.content:
常考句型結構：
① It takes + 人 + 時間 + to V：It takes me 30 minutes to get to school.
② spend + 時間 + V-ing：I spend an hour studying every day.
③ too...to vs enough to：He is too young to drive. / She is old enough to vote.
④ not only...but also：She is not only smart but also kind.
⑤ the + 比較級, the + 比較級：The harder you work, the more you learn.
⚠️ 這五個句型幾乎每年會考都出！

主詞動詞一致性：
① Everyone is ✅ / are ❌（不定代名詞+單數V）
② Neither A nor B + V看B
③ Not only A but also B + V看B
④ A number of + 複數V / The number of + 單數V
⑤ Math is ✅（學科=單數）

常見倒裝句（認識即可）：
① Not only did he sing, but he also danced.（他不但唱歌還跳舞）
② Never have I seen such a beautiful sunset.（我從沒見過如此美的日落）
③ Here comes the bus.（公車來了）
④ So do I.（我也是）/ Neither do I.（我也不）
⚠️ 倒裝 = 助動詞/be動詞放主詞前面
考試認識即可，寫作不必刻意用

綜合改錯：
① Although he is tired, but he kept working. → 去but
② I have visited Japan last summer. → visited（有last）
③ She suggested to go home. → suggested going
④ The number of students are 30. → is
⑤ If I am you, I would study harder. → were

找主旨的技巧：
① 看首段最後一句（常是主題句）
② 看每段第一句（段落主題）
③ 看最後一段（結論/總結）
常見問法：What is the passage mainly about?
What is the best title for this passage?
⚠️ 主旨 = 整篇在講什麼，不是某個細節
例：文章講「運動對健康的好處」→ 主旨不是「跑步的方法」

找細節的技巧：
① 先看題目 → 找關鍵字（人名/數字/地點）
② 回文章掃描關鍵字的位置
③ 讀那個位置前後2~3行
常見問法：According to the passage, what/where/when...?
⚠️ 答案通常在文章中有對應句（換個說法）
例：文章寫 Tom goes jogging every morning. → 題目問 What does Tom do in the morning?

推論題技巧：
① 答案不會在文章裡直接寫出 → 要從線索「推出來」
② 常見問法：What can we infer from the passage?
What does the author imply?
What will probably happen next?
⚠️ 排除法：太極端的選項通常不對
例：文章說「他皺著眉頭看成績單」→ 推論：他對成績不滿意

圖表題技巧：
① 先看標題（Title）/ 圖例（Legend）/ 座標軸（X-axis, Y-axis）
② 數據對比看最大/最小/趨勢（上升↑下降↓持平→）
③ 結合文章內容和圖表數據
常見問法：According to the chart/table, which is true?
⚠️ 注意單位！（%百分比、人數、金額）
例：圖表顯示 2023 年銷量最高 → 答案選「Sales peaked in 2023.」

克漏字解題四步驟：
① 先通讀全文掌握大意（不要一題一題做）
② 看空格前後文判斷詞性（名詞？動詞？連接詞？）
③ 用語意+文法雙重檢查
④ 帶入選項驗證通順度
⚠️ 連接詞考最多：however（然而）/ therefore（因此）/ although（雖然）/ besides（此外）
例：He studied hard. __, he didn't pass. → However

生字猜測技巧：
① 看前後文（上下文線索）：The boy was famished. He hadn't eaten all day. → famished = very hungry
② 看字根字首：unhappy → un-(不) + happy = 不開心
③ 看同位語/定義句：A pediatrician, a doctor for children, ... → pediatrician = 兒科醫生
常見問法：What does "..." most likely mean?
⚠️ 不需要認識每個字，學會從語境推測！

篇章結構（排序題）技巧：
① 找首句（引言/主題句）
② 看指示詞（this/these → 前面提過的東西）
③ 看連接詞（First...Then...Finally）
④ 找結尾句（In conclusion/Therefore）
⚠️ 注意時間順序和邏輯順序

會考長篇閱讀應對策略：
① 先看題目 → 帶著問題讀
② 每段讀完標記重點
③ 不要每個字都查 → 抓大意
④ 時間分配：每篇約3~4分鐘
⚠️ 先做有把握的題，難的跳過最後回來

會考閱讀陷阱：
① 選項用文章原文但意思扭曲
② 部分正確但不完整
③ 以偏概全（用細節當主旨）
④ 常識正確但文章沒提到
⚠️ 答案一定要「從文章找到依據」

閱讀考試心態：
① 平常多讀 → 閱讀速度自然提升
② 不要怕長文 → 分段處理
③ 錯了不要氣餒 → 分析錯因更重要
④ 考前一週每天練1~2篇
⚠️ 閱讀能力 = 長期累積，無法臨時抱佛腳

高頻動詞片語①：
look for（尋找）→ I'm looking for my keys.
look after（照顧）→ She looks after her grandma.
look forward to + V-ing（期待）→ I'm looking forward to seeing you.
take care of（照顧）→ Take care of yourself.
take part in（參加）→ He took part in the contest.
take place（發生）→ The meeting will take place tomorrow.
give up（放棄）→ Never give up!
give in（讓步）→ He finally gave in.
⚠️ look forward to + V-ing！不是 to + V

高頻動詞片語②：
turn on/off（打開/關閉）→ Turn on the light. / Turn off the TV.
turn up/down（調大/小）→ Can you turn down the music?
pick up（撿起/學會/接人）→ Pick up the trash. / I picked up some Japanese.
put on（穿上）→ Put on your jacket.
take off（脫下/起飛）→ Take off your shoes. / The plane took off.
run out of（用完）→ We ran out of milk.
come up with（想出）→ She came up with a great idea.

高頻動詞片語③：
get along with（和…相處）→ I get along well with my classmates.
get over（克服）→ She finally got over her fear.
get rid of（擺脫）→ I need to get rid of these old clothes.
make up one's mind（下定決心）→ I've made up my mind to study abroad.
make a difference（有影響）→ Small actions can make a big difference.
figure out（想出/理解）→ I can't figure out this math problem.
find out（發現/查出）→ I found out the truth.

高頻介系詞片語：
in fact（事實上）→ In fact, he is very kind.
in addition（此外）→ She is smart. In addition, she is hard-working.
in general（一般來說）→ In general, students like this class.
on the other hand（另一方面）→ On the other hand, it's too expensive.
on purpose（故意）→ He did it on purpose.
by the way（順帶一提）→ By the way, are you free tonight?
by accident（意外地）→ I broke the cup by accident.

轉折與論述片語：
however（然而）→ He is smart. However, he is lazy.
therefore（因此）→ She studied hard. Therefore, she passed.
moreover / furthermore（而且/此外）→ The food is good. Moreover, it's cheap.
for example / for instance（例如）→ I like fruits, for example, apples and bananas.
in other words（換句話說）→ He failed. In other words, he didn't pass.
as a result（結果）→ It rained. As a result, the game was canceled.
in conclusion（總結）→ In conclusion, exercise is good for health.
⚠️ 會考克漏字最常考這類！

日常慣用語①：
It's a piece of cake.（超簡單）
Break a leg!（祝好運）
Hang in there!（撐住）
No pain, no gain.（沒有付出就沒有收穫）
Better late than never.（遲到總比不到好）

日常慣用語②：
It's up to you.（由你決定）
Take it easy.（放輕鬆）
You can say that again!（你說的沒錯！）
I couldn't agree more.（完全同意）
Long time no see.（好久不見）

make/take/have 片語整理：
make: make a mistake / make friends / make sure
take: take a walk / take a break / take turns
have: have fun / have a cold / have a seat
⚠️ 這三個動詞的片語量最大，分類背

易混片語辨析：
① look at（看）vs look for（找）vs look like（像）
② used to V（過去常）vs be used to V-ing（習慣）
③ in front of（前面）vs in the front of（前排→在裡面的前面）
④ on time（準時）vs in time（及時）

填入正確片語：
① I'm __ __ __ my birthday party.（looking forward to）
② She __ __ __ a solution.（came up with）
③ Don't __ __! You can do it!（give up）
④ __ __, she passed the test.（As a result / In the end）
⑤ We should __ __ __ the elderly.（take care of）

英文段落基本結構：
① 主題句（Topic Sentence）→ 一句話點出重點
② 支持句（Supporting Sentences）→ 舉例/解釋
③ 結論句（Concluding Sentence）→ 總結/收尾
⚠️ 每段一個重點，不要東講西講

主題句 = 段落的靈魂：
好的主題句：清楚、具體、可展開
✅ Exercise is important for three reasons.
❌ Exercise.（太短）
❌ Exercise is important and good and healthy.（太雜）
⚠️ 一句話讓讀者知道你要講什麼

好用轉折詞分類：
列舉：First / Second / Finally
補充：Also / In addition / Moreover
轉折：However / On the other hand
因果：Therefore / As a result
⚠️ 有轉折詞的文章讀起來更流暢！

看圖寫作四步驟：
① 觀察圖片：人物/場景/動作/表情
② 想時態：正在做→進行式 / 做了→過去式
③ 用5W1H展開：Who/What/When/Where/Why/How
④ 寫結尾：感想/結論/心得
⚠️ 會考寫作通常是看圖寫4~6句

英文書信/Email格式：
Dear Mr. Chen,（親愛的陳先生→開頭）
I am writing to ask about the English contest.（我寫信來詢問英語比賽→第一段：目的）
Could you please tell me the date and location?（第二段：細節）
Thank you for your time.（感謝您的時間）
I look forward to hearing from you.（期待您的回覆→結尾）
Sincerely,（誠摯地）
Amy Lin
⚠️ 書信/Email是會考寫作常考題型！

寫作萬用句型：
In my opinion, ...（以我的看法）
I believe that ...（我相信）
There are several reasons why ...（有幾個原因）
First of all, ... / In addition, ...
In conclusion, ...（總結來說）

寫作常見錯誤：
① 中式英文：Because...so... → 去掉一個
② 缺主詞：Is important to study. → It is important...
③ Run-on sentence：用逗號連兩個獨立句 → 用連接詞或句號
④ 拼字粗心：too/to/two、there/their/they're

會考寫作模擬題：
「你最喜歡的季節是什麼？為什麼？」
結構建議：
① My favorite season is summer.
② 原因1 + 例子
③ 原因2 + 例子
④ In conclusion, summer is the best season for me.
⚠️ 寫作練習：計時15分鐘完成50字

易混動詞：
borrow（借入）vs lend（借出）
lie（躺→lay-lain）vs lay（放→laid-laid）
rise（升起→不及物）vs raise（舉起→及物）
remind（提醒別人）vs remember（自己記得）

易混形容詞副詞：
quiet（安靜的）vs quite（相當）
late（遲的）vs lately（最近）
hard（努力地）vs hardly（幾乎不）
alike（相似的→adj）vs like（像→prep）

易混名動詞：
advice（建議→名詞）vs advise（建議→動詞）
practice（練習→名詞）vs practise（練習→動詞）
effect（影響→名詞）vs affect（影響→動詞）
⚠️ 名詞和動詞只差一個字母！

易混介系詞/連接詞：
beside（旁邊）vs besides（此外）
between（兩者之間）vs among（三者以上之間）
except（除了→排除）vs accept（接受）
⚠️ 拼字和發音都很像，考試愛考！

易混片語動詞：
turn on（打開）vs turn off（關閉）/ turn up（調大）vs turn down（調小）
put on（穿上）vs take off（脫下/起飛）
pick up（撿起/學會/接人）vs put down（放下）
find（找到）vs find out（發現/查出）/ look（看）vs look for（尋找）vs look after（照顧）

常見同音異字：
there（那裡）/ their（他們的）/ they're（他們是）
its（它的）/ it's（它是=it is）
your（你的）/ you're（你是=you are）
two（二）/ too（也/太）/ to（到/去）
weather（天氣）/ whether（是否）

否定前綴：
un-：unhappy（不開心）/ unable（無法）/ unusual（不尋常）
im-：impossible（不可能）/ impolite（不禮貌）/ impatient（沒耐心）
in-：incorrect（不正確）/ independent（獨立的）/ invisible（看不見的）
dis-：disagree（不同意）/ disappear（消失）/ discover（發現）

常見字根字首（猜字利器）：
re-：again（再次）→ redo（重做）/ rewrite（重寫）/ return（返回）
pre-：before（之前）→ preview（預覽）/ prepare（準備）
-ful：full of（充滿）→ helpful（有幫助的）/ beautiful（美麗的）
-less：without（沒有）→ homeless（無家的）/ useless（無用的）
-tion/-sion：名詞化 → information（資訊）/ decision（決定）

轉折連接：
however（然而）/ nevertheless（儘管如此）/ on the contrary（相反地）
although（雖然）/ even though（即使）
in spite of / despite（儘管→接名詞）
⚠️ however = but 的正式版（前面用句號或分號）

因果論述：
therefore（因此）/ thus（因此）/ as a result（結果）
consequently（因此）/ due to（由於→接名詞）
because of（因為→接名詞）/ owing to（由於）/ thanks to（多虧）
⚠️ because + 子句 / because of + 名詞

補充列舉：
in addition（此外）/ moreover（而且）/ furthermore（此外）
besides（此外）/ for example（例如）/ for instance（例如）
such as（例如→接名詞）/ like（像→接名詞）
⚠️ such as 後接名詞，不接句子

時序用語：
first（首先）/ then（然後）/ next（接著）/ after that（之後）
finally（最後）/ meanwhile（同時）/ at the same time（同時）
eventually（最終）/ previously（之前）/ afterward（之後）/ since then（從那時起）

觀點表達：
in my opinion（以我的看法）/ from my point of view（就我看來）
I believe（我相信）/ I think（我認為）/ It seems that（似乎）
apparently（顯然）/ obviously（明顯地）/ clearly（清楚地）

程度修飾：
extremely（極度地）/ significantly（顯著地）/ slightly（稍微）
somewhat（有些）/ gradually（逐漸地）/ rapidly（快速地）
dramatically（戲劇性地）/ steadily（穩定地）
approximately（大約）/ nearly / almost（幾乎）

對比用語：
compared to / with（與...比較）/ in contrast（對照之下）
on the other hand（另一方面）
similarly（類似地）/ likewise（同樣地）/ in the same way（同樣地）
while / whereas（然而→對比）/ unlike（不像）

總結用語：
in conclusion（總結來說）/ to sum up（總而言之）
in short（簡言之）/ overall（整體而言）
all in all（總的來說）/ in a word（一言以蔽之）/ to conclude（總結）

廣告招牌：
advertisement / ad（廣告）/ promotion（促銷）
bargain（特價品）/ discount（折扣）
limited（限量的）/ available（可取得的）
reservation（預約）/ opening hours（營業時間）
⚠️ 會考常考廣告/傳單類閱讀

通知公告：
announcement（公告）/ notice（通知）/ reminder（提醒）
warning（警告）/ cancel（取消）/ postpone（延期）
reschedule（改期）/ deadline（截止日期）
⚠️ 公告類文體 = 會考閱讀常見題型

菜單點餐：
menu（菜單）/ appetizer（前菜）/ main course（主菜）
dessert（甜點）/ beverage（飲料）
order（點餐）/ serve（上菜）/ recommend（推薦）
specialty（招牌菜）/ portion（份量）

行程表：
schedule / timetable（時刻表）/ departure（出發）
arrival（抵達）/ route（路線）/ destination（目的地）
connection（轉乘）/ delay（延誤）/ boarding（登機/上車）

信件Email：
dear（親愛的→開頭）/ sincerely（誠摯地→結尾）
regards（問候→結尾）/ reply（回覆）/ forward（轉寄）
attachment（附件）/ subject（主旨）/ signature（簽名）

會考模擬閱讀：
Dear Students（親愛的同學們）,
The school sports day（運動會）, which was scheduled for（原定）this Friday,
has been postponed to（延期到）next Monday due to（因為）the weather forecast（天氣預報）.
Please check the updated schedule（更新的時程表）on the school website.
If you have any questions（問題）, feel free to（請隨時）ask your homeroom teacher（導師）.
Thank you for your understanding.（感謝您的諒解）

① háng 行列、銀行、行業 → 跟「排列、商業」有關
② xíng 行走、行為、執行 → 跟「動作、做」有關
③ hàng 樹行子 → 排列（較少用）
④ héng 道行 → 修行的功力
記法：看到「行」先想語境 →「走路/做事」念xíng，「行業/排列」念háng

① shù（四聲）名詞：數學、數目、數量 →「那個數字」
② shǔ（三聲）動詞：數一數、數落、數不清 →「在算/在唸」
③ shuò（四聲）副詞：數見不鮮 = 屢次 →「頻繁地」
⚠️ 最常錯：「數不清」唸 shǔ（在算的動作）不是 shù

① qiáng（二聲）：強大、堅強、強壯 → 有力量
② qiǎng（三聲）：勉強、強迫、強求 → 硬要、不情願
③ jiàng（四聲）：倔強 → 固執不服輸
訣竅：「好的力量」→ qiáng；「硬要做」→ qiǎng；「固執脾氣」→ jiàng

「樂」：
① lè：快樂、樂趣 → 開心
② yuè：音樂、樂器 → 跟音樂有關
③ yào：樂山樂水（喜愛）→ 論語專用
「說」：
① shuō：說話、小說
② shuì：遊說 → 用言語說服別人
③ yuè：不亦說乎 = 不亦悅乎（通假字，喜悅）

① zhǒng（三聲）名詞：種類、種子、人種 → 類別
② zhòng（四聲）動詞：種花、種田、種植 → 栽種的動作
⚠️「種」只有兩個音！不要跟「中」搞混
記法：名詞念三聲（那是什麼種？），動詞念四聲（去種田）

① cháng（二聲）：長度、長短、很長 → 跟「距離/尺寸」有關
② zhǎng（三聲）：長大、成長、長輩、校長 → 跟「成長/領導」有關
訣竅：可以用尺量的 → cháng；跟人有關的 → zhǎng
⚠️「長進」= zhǎng（進步）；「長途」= cháng（距離遠）

① de（輕聲）：跑得快、吃得飽 → 助詞（補語標記）
② dé（二聲）：得到、取得、得分 → 獲得
③ děi（三聲）：你得走了 = 你必須走了 → 必須
⚠️「得」當助詞永遠輕聲！「跑得快」不是「跑 dé 快」

① hái（二聲）：還有、還是、還好 → 仍然、另外
② huán（二聲）：歸還、還書、還債 → 歸回
記法：跟「仍然/又」有關 → hái；跟「還回去」有關 → huán
⚠️「還是」= hái（仍然是 / 或者）
「還本付息」= huán（歸還本金）

① jiān（一聲）：中間、房間、時間、空間 → 名詞/空間
② jiàn（四聲）：間接、間隔、間諜、離間 → 分隔/偷偷
記法：看得見的空間 → jiān；看不見的「暗中/隔開」→ jiàn
⚠️「黑白相間」= jiàn（交替隔開）

① wéi（二聲）：作為、成為、認為、為人 → 做/當作
② wèi（四聲）：為了、因為、為何 → 為了某目的/原因
判斷口訣：可以替換成「做」→ wéi；可以替換成「為了」→ wèi
例：「為民服務」= wèi（為了人民）
「事在人為」= wéi（人去做）

① xiāng（一聲）：互相、相同、相信 → 互相/彼此
② xiàng（四聲）：相片、宰相、相貌、看相 → 外表/官職
記法：「彼此之間」→ xiāng（平等互動）
「看到的樣子」→ xiàng（外在形象）
⚠️「真相」= xiàng（事情的面貌）

七年級必背Top12破音字速查：
行 háng/xíng｜數 shù/shǔ｜強 qiáng/qiǎng/jiàng
樂 lè/yuè｜說 shuō/shuì｜種 zhǒng/zhòng
長 cháng/zhǎng｜得 dé/de/děi｜還 hái/huán
間 jiān/jiàn｜為 wéi/wèi｜相 xiāng/xiàng
口訣：遇到不確定 → ①判詞性 ②套語境 ③想固定搭配

「萬人空巷」
❌ 以為：街上沒人，很冷清
✅ 正解：大家都出來看熱鬧，街巷都空了
典故：宋代蘇軾詩「賴有明朝看潮在，萬人空巷鬥新妝」
記法：空的是「巷子/家裡」，因為人都跑到街上了

「差強人意」
❌ 以為：讓人很不滿意、很差
✅ 正解：大致上還能讓人滿意
「差」= 稍微，「強」= 振奮
典故：《後漢書》形容吳漢的表現尚可
記法：「差」不是差勁，是「稍微」的意思

「首當其衝」
❌ 以為：帶頭衝鋒、衝在最前面
✅ 正解：最先受到攻擊或災難
「衝」= 要道/衝擊，不是衝鋒
例句：颱風來襲，沿海地區首當其衝
記法：「衝」是被動的（被衝擊），不是主動的（去衝鋒）

「不刊之論」
❌ 以為：不值得刊登的言論
✅ 正解：不能修改的精闢言論
「刊」= 古代指削除竹簡上的字 = 修改
「不刊」= 不能刪改 = 完美無瑕
記法：古代的「刊」≠ 現代的「刊登」

「七月流火」
❌ 以為：七月天氣很熱，像火在流
✅ 正解：大火星（心宿二）西沉，天氣轉涼
出自《詩經》，「火」= 星座名稱，不是火焰
記法：這是天文現象，描述秋天來了
⚠️ 用來形容炎熱是錯誤用法

「目無全牛」
❌ 以為：驕傲自大，連牛都看不起
✅ 正解：技藝高超，不再看到完整的牛
典故：《莊子》庖丁解牛，熟練到只看到骨節間隙
記法：看不到「全牛」是因為太專業了
⚠️ 褒義詞！形容技藝精湛

「趨之若鶩」
❌ 常被用來形容：大家熱情追捧（褒義）
✅ 正解：像鴨子一樣成群跑去 → 貶義！
形容人們不顧一切地追求不好的事物
⚠️ 鶩 = 鴨子，鴨子亂跑是醜態
正面追捧應該用「趨之若鶩」以外的詞

「罄竹難書」
❌ 有人用來形容：功績很多，寫不完
✅ 正解：罪行多到竹簡寫不完 → 專指壞事！
「罄」= 用盡，「竹」= 古代竹簡
典故：隋煬帝的罪行多到竹簡都寫不完
⚠️ 千萬不能用來稱讚別人

「始作俑者」
❌ 以為：帶頭做好事的第一人
✅ 正解：首開惡例的人 → 貶義！
典故：孔子批評第一個用人俑陪葬的人
「始作」= 最先開始做，「俑」= 陪葬人偶
⚠️ 不能用來稱讚「開創先河的人」

常見褒貶搞反的成語整理：
✅ 褒義卻常被誤用為貶義：
「差強人意」= 還不錯 ｜「目無全牛」= 技藝精
❌ 貶義卻常被誤用為褒義：
「趨之若鶩」= 盲目追逐 ｜「罄竹難書」= 罪行多
「始作俑者」= 首開惡例 ｜「無所不為」= 什麼壞事都做
判斷口訣：先想典故，再判褒貶

什麼是譬喻？用「已知」來解釋「未知」
三種譬喻一次搞懂：
① 明喻：有「像、如、似、彷彿」→ 他的笑容像陽光
② 暗喻：有「是、成為」→ 書是心靈的糧食
③ 借喻：直接替換 → 別當乖乖的草莓（草莓=脆弱的人）
判斷口訣：有「像」→ 明喻；有「是」→ 暗喻；直接換 → 借喻
items.pushTitle: 譬喻三兄弟：明喻暗喻借喻

items.content:
明喻的標誌詞（喻詞）：
像、如、似、若、彷彿、宛如、好比、猶如
結構公式：喻體 + 喻詞 + 喻依
例：月亮（喻體）像（喻詞）一面鏡子（喻依）
⚠️ 有時候喻詞藏得很深：
「那雙眼睛，簡直是兩顆黑寶石」→ 這其實是暗喻（用「是」）
看到「簡直」不代表是明喻！要看連接詞

暗喻 vs 明喻的關鍵差異：
明喻：A 像 B → 保留「像」→ 兩者並存
暗喻：A 是 B → 直接等同 → 語氣更強
例：
明喻：母愛像春風一樣溫暖
暗喻：母愛是春風
⚠️ 暗喻沒有「像」，而是用「是、成為、變成」
考試常問：「下列何者為暗喻？」→ 找「是/成為」

借喻是最進階的譬喻：
直接用 B 代替 A，A 完全不出現
例：「她是我們班的草莓族」→ 這是暗喻（有「是」）
「我們班那顆草莓又哭了」→ 這是借喻（直接用草莓代替脆弱的人）
⚠️ 借喻跟「借代」容易搞混：
借喻：基於「相似」→ 草莓像脆弱的人
借代：基於「相關」→ 布衣代指平民（穿布衣和平民「相關」）

譬喻判斷三步驟（考試實戰）：
① 有沒有兩個不同事物在比較？→ 沒有就不是譬喻
② 有沒有喻詞（像/如/是）？→ 有「像」= 明喻，有「是」= 暗喻
③ 完全沒有喻詞但用B代A？→ 借喻
⚠️ 陷阱：「他像他爸爸」→ 不是譬喻！是直接比較同類事物
譬喻必須是「不同類」的事物：人 vs 陽光 ✅ 人 vs 人 ❌

譬喻經典考題範例：
「問君能有幾多愁？恰似一江春水向東流」→ 明喻（恰似）
「書是智慧的鑰匙」→ 暗喻（是）
「那隻乖乖的綿羊終於發脾氣了」→ 借喻（綿羊=溫馴的人）
「人生如戲」→ 明喻（如）
「花謝花飛花滿天」→ ❌ 不是譬喻！沒有兩物相比
⚠️ 最常考明喻 → 找到喻詞就對了

轉化 = 把事物「變身」
三種轉化：
① 擬人：把「非人」當人寫 → 花兒在微笑
② 擬物：把「人」當物寫 → 他夾著尾巴逃走了
③ 形象化：把抽象的變具體 → 他嚐到了失敗的苦澀
⚠️ 擬人最常考！看到花草動物有人的動作/情感 → 擬人法

擬人法的三大線索：
① 非人事物 + 人的動作 → 風在唱歌、樹在跳舞
② 非人事物 + 人的情感 → 太陽公公很開心、小草嘆了口氣
③ 非人事物 + 人的語言 → 花兒說：「我好渴」
常見出題方式：
「下列何者使用擬人法？」→ 找出「非人的主詞」+「人的行為」
⚠️「他笑得像花一樣」→ 是譬喻不是擬人！主詞是「人」

擬物法＋形象化：
擬物：人 → 當物品/動物寫
「他搖著尾巴討好上司」→ 人當狗寫
「她躲進殼裡不想面對世界」→ 人當蝸牛寫
形象化：抽象概念 → 具體感官
「甜蜜的回憶」→ 回憶不能吃，但用味覺形容
「沉重的壓力壓在肩上」→ 壓力沒有重量，用觸覺形容
⚠️ 形象化通常用「五感」來寫抽象的東西

轉化 vs 譬喻 怎麼分？
譬喻：A 像/是 B → 兩個東西並列比較
轉化：A 直接變成 B → 只寫B的行為，沒有比較
例：
「風像一個調皮的孩子」→ 譬喻（風和孩子並列+像）
「風調皮地翻開了書頁」→ 轉化/擬人（風直接做人的動作）
判斷口訣：有「像/是」→ 譬喻；直接行動 → 轉化
items.pushTitle: 轉化 vs 譬喻怎麼分

items.content:
轉化經典考題：
「陰風怒號，濁浪排空」→ 擬人（風在怒吼=人的情緒）
「他聞到了成功的芬芳」→ 形象化（成功沒有味道）
「那條蛇般的隊伍緩緩前進」→ 譬喻不是轉化！（有「般」= 像）
「大地母親張開雙臂」→ 擬人（大地做人的動作）
⚠️ 注意：「春風又綠江南岸」的「綠」→ 台灣課本多歸為「轉品」（形容詞轉動詞），不是典型擬人

誇飾 = 把事情說得「超級大」或「超級小」
故意誇大或縮小，讓讀者印象更深刻
誇大：「飛流直下三千尺」→ 瀑布沒有三千尺
誇大：「白髮三千丈」→ 頭髮不可能這麼長
縮小：「他的心眼只有針尖那麼大」→ 不可能那麼小
⚠️ 誇飾不是說謊！是文學手法，讓情感更強烈

誇飾的四種方向：
① 誇大數量：白髮三千丈、千軍萬馬
② 誇大感受：度日如年（一天像一年那麼漫長）
③ 誇大速度：一日千里（進步超快）
④ 縮小：彈丸之地（形容地方很小）
⚠️ 誇飾 vs 譬喻的區別：
「度日如年」→ 同時是誇飾+譬喻（誇大+用「如」比較）
一句話可以同時有兩種修辭！

誇飾經典考題：
「怒髮衝冠」→ 頭髮氣到把帽子頂起來 → 誇飾
「淚流成河」→ 眼淚不會變河 → 誇飾
「他等了一萬年」→ 不可能等那麼久 → 誇飾
「蜀道之難，難於上青天」→ 比登天還難 → 誇飾+譬喻
⚠️ 看到「不合常理的數字或程度」→ 就是誇飾
陷阱：「他跑得很快」→ 不是誇飾（沒有超出常理）

中文詞性分兩大家族：
實詞（有實在意義，能單獨使用）：
① 名詞：人事物的名稱 → 老師、台北、友情
② 動詞：動作或狀態 → 跑、吃、是、有
③ 形容詞：描述性質 → 美麗、高大、認真
④ 副詞：修飾動詞/形容詞 → 很、非常、已經
⑤ 代名詞：代替名詞 → 你、我、他、這、那
⑥ 數量詞：數目+單位 → 三本、一群

虛詞（沒有實在意義，不能單獨使用）：
① 介詞：放在名詞前表關係 → 在、從、對、向、用
② 連接詞：連接詞語或句子 → 和、但是、因為、所以
③ 助詞：附在詞語上表語氣/結構 → 的、了、嗎、呢
④ 嘆詞：表達情感 → 啊、唉、哇、喔
⚠️ 實詞像磚塊（有實體），虛詞像水泥（黏合用）
口訣：實詞六個名動形副代數，虛詞四個介連助嘆

名詞細分三種：
① 普通名詞：書、狗、山 → 一般事物
② 專有名詞：台灣、孔子、台北101 → 特定名稱
③ 抽象名詞：愛情、正義、自由 → 看不見摸不到
判斷秘訣：前面能加「一個/一種」的 → 通常是名詞
「一個老師」✅「一個漂亮」❌（漂亮是形容詞）
⚠️ 有些詞看起來像動詞但其實是名詞：「教育」「思想」「研究」

動詞的五種面貌：
① 動作動詞：跑、吃、寫、看 → 身體動作
② 心理動詞：喜歡、害怕、覺得 → 心裡的活動
③ 表態動詞（繫詞）：是 →「他是學生」
④ 存在動詞：有、在 →「桌上有書」「他在家」
⑤ 助動詞：能、會、可以、應該 →「你能來嗎？」
判斷秘訣：前面能加「不」→ 通常是動詞或形容詞
「不吃」✅「不書」❌ →「書」是名詞不是動詞

形容詞 vs 副詞 怎麼分？
形容詞：修飾「名詞」→ 漂亮的花、高大的樹
副詞：修飾「動詞/形容詞」→ 很漂亮、已經走了
⚠️ 同一個字可能是不同詞性：
「快」：「快車」→ 形容詞（修飾車）
「快」：「快跑」→ 副詞（修飾跑）
判斷口訣：修飾名詞找形容，修飾動形找副詞
常見副詞：很、都、已經、正在、常常、也、不、再

介詞和連接詞怎麼分？
介詞：後面一定接名詞 → 組成「介賓短語」
「在」教室讀書（在+教室）、「從」台北出發（從+台北）
連接詞：連接兩個對等的成分
「他聰明而且認真」（而且連接兩個形容詞）
⚠️ 有些詞同時可當介詞和連接詞：
「和」：「我和他」→ 連接詞（連接兩個代名詞）
「和」：「我和他討論」→ 介詞（和他=對象）
